CeladonCity_EventScript_LittleGirl: I got my KOFFING in CINNABAR.
It's usually nice, but it breathes  poison when it's angry.
CeladonCity_EventScript_OldMan1: Heheh! This GYM is great!  It's full of women!
CeladonCity_EventScript_Woman: CELADON takes pride in its efforts  to keep the city beautiful.
That's why the new GAME CORNER is  bad for our city's image.
CeladonCity_EventScript_OldMan2: Moan…  I blew it all at the slots!
I knew I should have cashed in my  COINS for prizes!
CeladonCity_EventScript_FatMan: This is my trusted pal, POLIWRATH.
It evolved from a POLIWHIRL when  I used a WATER STONE.
CeladonCity_EventScript_RocketGrunt1: Keep out of TEAM ROCKET's way!
CeladonCity_EventScript_RocketGrunt2: What are you staring at?  Get lost, or I'll punch you.
CeladonCity_EventScript_Boy: Aaaagh, ow…  I scalded my tongue!
This nice old lady in the MANSION  gave me some TEA.
But it was boiling hot!  Gotta cool it to drink it.

The thief came running this way,  I'm sure of it.
But I lost sight of him!  Where'd he go?

DIRE HIT jacks up the likelihood  of critical hits.
Get your items at the CELADON  DEPT. STORE!

Text_SoftboiledTeach: I've seen you about, but I never  had a chance to chat.
It must be good luck that brought  us together finally.
I'd like to celebrate by teaching  you the move SOFTBOILED.
Text_SoftboiledDeclined: I'll always be keeping an eye out  for you.
I hope we can chat again.

CeladonCity_Condominiums_1F_EventScript_: You shouldn't spend all your money  on drinks.
Nothing beats thirst like some hot  TEA.
My dear POKéMON keep me company.  MEOWTH even brings money home!
Oh, hello, dearie.  Did you enjoy my TEA?
By the way, dear. Are you, by any  chance, from PALLET TOWN?
A girl from PALLET TOWN, DAISY,  she enjoys TEA every day.
She visits the CELADON DEPT. STORE  to buy some TEA.

CeladonCity_Condominiums_RoofRoom_EventS: There is nothing that I don't know,  like I wrote on the blackboard.
I know about the world of POKéMON  in your GAME BOY ADVANCE!
Get together with your friends and  enjoy trading POKéMON!
There are fifty TMs in all.
There are also seven HMs that  can be used repeatedly.
The POKéMON WIRELESS CLUB is  upstairs at any POKéMON CENTER.
Visit one to link up with friend(s)  using your Wireless Adapter.
To link only with a friend, go to  the DIRECT CORNER.
It is the right counter at the  POKéMON WIRELESS CLUB.
Go into the TRADE CORNER or the  COLOSSEUM with your friend.
To link and communicate with  anyone, go to the UNION ROOM.
It is the left counter at the  POKéMON WIRELESS CLUB.
Go to the UNION ROOM and enjoy  meeting other TRAINERS.

CeladonCity_DepartmentStore_3F_EventScri: Captured POKéMON are registered  with an ID No. and the OT.
OT stands for “Original TRAINER” -  the TRAINER that caught it first.
My buddy's going to trade me his  KANGASKHAN for my HAUNTER!
I love HAUNTER!  I collect them!
HAUNTER turned into a different  POKéMON while being traded!
You can identify POKéMON you get  in trades by their ID Numbers.
An RPG!  There's no time for that!
A sports game!  Dad'll like that!
Red and Green!  Both are POKéMON!

HP UP increases the base HP of a  POKéMON.
CALCIUM raises the base SP. ATK  stat of one POKéMON.
ZINC boosts the base SP. DEF stat  of one POKéMON.
CARBOS enhances the base SPEED  stat.
I'm here for POKéMON stat  enhancers.
PROTEIN increases the base ATTACK  power.
IRON increases the base DEFENSE  stat.

CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_Erika: You are cataloging POKéMON?  I must say I'm impressed.
I would never collect POKéMON if  they were unattractive.
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_GiveTM19: The RAINBOWBADGE will make  POKéMON up to Lv. 50 obey.
It also allows POKéMON to use  STRENGTH in and out of battle.
Please also take this with you.
Half the damage it inflicts is  drained to heal your POKéMON.
Wouldn't you agree that it's a  wonderful move?
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_NoRoomForTM1: You should make room for this.
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_Kay: Bleaah!  I hope ERIKA wipes you out!
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_Lisa: Our LEADER ERIKA might be quiet,  but she's famous around here.
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_Tina: Oh, you were looking at ERIKA…  You weren't looking at me…
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_Bridget: GRASS-type POKéMON are tough  against the WATER type.
They also have an edge on ROCK-  and GROUND-type POKéMON.
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_Tamia: We only use GRASS-type POKéMON at  our GYM.
Why? We also use them for making  flower arrangements!
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_Lori: I have a blind date coming up.  I have to learn to be polite,  especially if I have to battle.
CeladonCity_Gym_EventScript_Mary: I didn't bring my best POKéMON.  Wait until next time!
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_ErikaIntro: Hello…  Lovely weather, isn't it?  It's so pleasant…
…Oh, dear…  I must have dozed off. Welcome.
My name is ERIKA.  I am the LEADER of CELADON GYM.
I am a student of the art of  flower arranging.
My POKéMON are solely of the  GRASS type.
…Oh, I'm sorry, I had no idea that  you wished to challenge me.
Very well, but I shall not lose.
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_ErikaDefeat: Oh!  I concede defeat.  You are remarkably strong.
I must confer on you the  RAINBOWBADGE.
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_ErikaPostBattle: You are cataloging POKéMON?  I must say I'm impressed.
I would never collect POKéMON if  they were unattractive.
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_ExplainRainbowBadge: The RAINBOWBADGE will make  POKéMON up to Lv. 50 obey.
It also allows POKéMON to use  STRENGTH in and out of battle.
Please also take this with you.
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_ExplainTM19: Half the damage it inflicts is  drained to heal your POKéMON.
Wouldn't you agree that it's a  wonderful move?
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_ShouldMakeRoomForTh: You should make room for this.
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_KayIntro: I should tell you about this GYM.
Only real ladies are allowed in  here!
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_KayPostBattle: Bleaah!  I hope ERIKA wipes you out!
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_BridgetIntro: Oh, welcome.  I was getting bored.
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_BridgetPostBattle: GRASS-type POKéMON are tough  against the WATER type.
They also have an edge on ROCK-  and GROUND-type POKéMON.
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_TinaPostBattle: Oh, you were looking at ERIKA…  You weren't looking at me…
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_TamiaIntro: I like the GRASS type.  I like how they're easy to raise.
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_TamiaPostBattle: We only use GRASS-type POKéMON at  our GYM.
Why? We also use them for making  flower arrangements!
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_LisaIntro: We don't like BUG- or FIRE-type  POKéMON in here!
CeladonCity_Gym_Text_LisaPostBattle: Our LEADER ERIKA might be quiet,  but she's famous around here.

CeladonCity_Gym_Text_MaryPostBattle: I didn't bring my best POKéMON.  Wait until next time!

CeruleanCity_EventScript_Rival: You're still struggling along back  here?
I'm doing great! I caught a bunch  of strong and smart POKéMON!
Here, let me see what you caught,  [Player]!
I went to BILL's and got him to  show me his rare POKéMON.
That added a lot of pages to my  POKéDEX!
After all, BILL's world famous as a  POKéMANIAC.
He invented the POKéMON Storage  System on PC, too.
Since you're using his system,  you should go thank him.
Well, I better get rolling!  Smell ya later!
I feel sorry for you. No, really.  You're always plodding behind me.
So here, I'll give you a little  present as a favor.
A chatty gossip like you…  That thing's perfect.
I don't need it because I don't  give a hoot about others.
All right, this time I really am  gone. Smell ya!

I'm an innocent bystander!  Don't you believe me?

Even our POLICE FORCE has  trouble with the ROCKETS!

That way, you could get to the  other side.
I think there's a way around it,  though.

And, you would have to have  made a great achievement.

CeruleanCity_Gym_EventScript_Misty: Use it on an aquatic POKéMON!
CeruleanCity_Gym_EventScript_GiveTM03: The CASCADEBADGE makes all  POKéMON up to Lv. 30 obey.
That includes even outsiders you  got in trades.
There's more. You can now use CUT  anytime, even out of battle.
You can CUT down small trees to  open new pathways.
You can also have my favorite TM.
Use it on an aquatic POKéMON!
CeruleanCity_Gym_EventScript_NoRoomForTM: You better make room for this!
CeruleanCity_Gym_EventScript_Diana: You have to face other TRAINERS  to see how good you really are.
CeruleanCity_Gym_EventScript_Luis: MISTY is a TRAINER who's going to  keep improving.
She won't lose to someone like you!
CeruleanCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuy: Let me give you some advice!
The LEADER, MISTY, is a pro who  uses WATER-type POKéMON.
You can drain all their water with  GRASS-type POKéMON.
Or, you might use ELECTRIC-type  POKéMON and zap them!
CeruleanCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuyPostV: You beat MISTY!  See, what'd I tell ya?
You and me, kid, we make a pretty  darn-good team!
CeruleanCity_Gym_Text_MistyIntro: Only those TRAINERS who have a  policy about POKéMON can turn pro.
What is your approach when you  catch and train POKéMON?
My policy is an all-out offensive  with WATER-type POKéMON!

CeruleanCity_House1_EventScript_BadgeGuy: Only skilled TRAINERS can collect  POKéMON BADGES.
I see you have at least one.
Those BADGES have amazing secrets,  did you know?
CeruleanCity_House1_EventScript_Describe: The ATTACK stat of all your  POKéMON increases a little bit.
It also lets you use the move  FLASH outside of battle.
POKéMON up to Lv. 30 will obey  you.
That includes even outsiders you  obtain in trades.
POKéMON of higher levels will  be unruly in battle, however.
It also lets you use the move  CUT outside of battle.
The SPEED stat of all your  POKéMON increases a little bit.
It also lets you use the move  FLY outside of battle.
POKéMON up to Lv. 50 will obey  you.
That includes even outsiders you  obtain in trades.
POKéMON of higher levels will  be unruly in battle, however.
It also lets you use the move  STRENGTH outside of battle.
The DEFENSE stat of all your  POKéMON increases a little bit.
It also lets you use the move  SURF outside of battle.
POKéMON up to Lv. 70 will obey  you.
That includes even outsiders you  obtain in trades.
POKéMON of higher levels will  be unruly in battle, however.
It also lets you use the move  ROCK SMASH outside of battle.
The SP. ATK and SP. DEF stats of  all your POKéMON rise a little bit.
It also lets you use the move  WATERFALL outside of battle.
All POKéMON will obey you!

CeruleanCity_House2_EventScript_Hiker: Look what they've done to my  house!
They stole a TM for teaching  POKéMON how to DIG holes!
I was going to use it on a  MANKEY or a SANDSHREW…
That cost me a bundle, it did!
CeruleanCity_House2_EventScript_HikerGot: I figure what's lost is lost.
I decided to teach DIGLETT how to  DIG without a TM.

CeruleanCity_House4_EventScript_NoNews: Sigh…  Too much time, too little to do…
CeruleanCity_House4_EventScript_Reward_R: I see!  That was quite informative!
I applaud you for taking interest  in the news at your young age.
As my thanks for sharing the news  with me, I want you to have this.
Amazing!  What an incredible piece of news!
I haven't seen a news story this  incredible in too long a time!
Thanks for sharing this fantastic  news. Have a bunch of BERRIES!
CeruleanCity_House4_EventScript_Waiting: It seems such a shame to not share  this news with other folks…
I wish I could tell someone…  Let others know the news…
CeruleanCity_House4_EventScript_Reward_S: Ah, you've spread the news for me?
Good news becomes worthwhile when  all sorts of people share it.
As my thanks for your spreading  the news, take this!
You've spread the news some more?  Magnificent!
That piece of news must be  delighted to be passed around so.
Consider this a show of  appreciation from me and the news.
I'll give you more BERRIES than  I usually do.
CeruleanCity_House4_EventScript_AtMax: I'm quite enjoying myself with all  sorts of news.
Yes, I am satisfied!  I won't be bored for a while.

CeruleanCity_House5_EventScript_BerryPow: I concoct a variety of medicine  from BERRY POWDER.
Using good BERRY POWDER, I can  make any kind of medicine.
Now tell me, have you any interest  in BERRIES?
Ah, good! For you, then, I have  just the thing.
There's something new on the second  floor of POKéMON CENTERS, at the  DIRECT CORNER.
They installed a Wireless Adapter  machine for crushing BERRIES.
This is where you come in.
I have a favor to ask, one that  I can entrust only to you.
Could you make BERRY POWDER for  me using that machine?
Don't forget, the machine is at the  DIRECT CORNER of POKéMON CENTERS.
I'll concoct medicine for you if  you bring me some BERRY POWDER.
Don't forget, crush BERRIES into  BERRY POWDER and bring it to me.
CeruleanCity_House5_EventScript_NoBerrie: Why must you lie to me?
How many BERRIES do you have?  Not a one!
CeruleanCity_House5_EventScript_NoIntere: You have no interest in BERRIES?
Young one, it's important to take an  interest in all sorts of things.
CeruleanCity_House5_EventScript_AskToExc: Er-hem! Have you brought me some  BERRY POWDER?
CeruleanCity_House5_EventScript_ExitMenu: Come see me if you'd like to trade  your BERRY POWDER.
CeruleanCity_House5_EventScript_Exchange: Fine, you'll exchange your BERRY  POWDER for one ?
This is fine BERRY POWDER indeed.  It will make excellent medicine.
Would you like to trade more BERRY  POWDER for something else?
That's fine, then.  I'll hope to see you back again.
CeruleanCity_House5_EventScript_NotEnoug: Hm? You don't have enough  BERRY POWDER.

Could you make BERRY POWDER for  me using that machine?
Don't forget, the machine is at the  DIRECT CORNER of POKéMON CENTERS.
I'll concoct medicine for you if  you bring me some BERRY POWDER.
Don't forget, crush BERRIES into  BERRY POWDER and bring it to me.

CinnabarIsland_EventScript_ReturnFromSev: Hey, wasn't that a long cruise?
My buddy CELIO seemed to enjoy  your company.
I'm sure he'd welcome you if you  were to visit him again.
If you have a TRI-PASS, you can  always take a ferry there from  VERMILION PORT.
All right, thanks for your company!

I hope you're still using my  PC system.
Well, listen, since we met up here,  how about spending time with me?
There's this little island in the far  south called ONE ISLAND.
A friend invited me, so I'm on my  way out there.
How about it?  Do you feel like coming with me?

I want to see one right away.  Please, make my wish come true.

I'll forgive you this time, but  please don't fail me next time.
SELPHY: Oh, hello, there.

You may leave.

FuchsiaCity_EventScript_OmanyteSign: Name: OMANYTE  An extremely rare POKéMON that was  regenerated from a fossil.
FuchsiaCity_Text_DidYouTrySafariGame: Did you try the SAFARI GAME?
There are some rare POKéMON that  can only be caught there.
FuchsiaCity_Text_SafariZoneZooInFront: The SAFARI ZONE has a zoo in front  of the entrance.
Out back is the SAFARI GAME for  catching POKéMON.
FuchsiaCity_Text_WheresSara: ERIK: Where's SARA?  I said I'd meet her here.
FuchsiaCity_Text_ItemBallInThere: That item ball in there…  Were you wanting that?
FuchsiaCity_Text_CitySign: FUCHSIA CITY  Behold! It's Passion Pink!
FuchsiaCity_Text_SafariZoneOfficeSign: POKéMON PARADISE!  Welcome to the SAFARI ZONE!  SAFARI ZONE OFFICE
FuchsiaCity_Text_GymSign: FUCHSIA CITY POKéMON GYM  LEADER: KOGA  The Poisonous Ninja Master
FuchsiaCity_Text_ChanseySign: Name: CHANSEY  Catching one is all up to chance.
FuchsiaCity_Text_VoltorbSign: Name: VOLTORB  The very image of a POKé BALL.
FuchsiaCity_Text_KangaskhanSign: A maternal POKéMON that raises its  young in a pouch on its belly.
FuchsiaCity_Text_SlowpokeSign: Name: SLOWPOKE  Friendly and very slow moving.
FuchsiaCity_Text_LaprasSign: Name: LAPRAS  AKA the king of the seas.
FuchsiaCity_Text_OmanyteSign: Name: OMANYTE  An extremely rare POKéMON that was  regenerated from a fossil.
FuchsiaCity_Text_KabutoSign: Name: KABUTO  An extremely rare POKéMON that was  regenerated from a fossil.
Text_SubstituteTeach: Aww, I wish I was a KANGASKHAN  baby.
I'd love to be a substitute for the  baby…
And snuggle in the mother  KANGASKHAN's belly pouch.
But only POKéMON can use the  technique SUBSTITUTE…
Want me to teach SUBSTITUTE to  one of your POKéMON?
Text_SubstituteDeclined: Oh, really?  SUBSTITUTE seems so fun…
Text_SubstituteWhichMon: Which POKéMON wants to learn  SUBSTITUTE?
Text_SubstituteTaught: Boy, what I'd give to crawl inside  a KANGASKHAN belly pouch…
FuchsiaCity_Text_MyFatherIsGymLeader: My father is the GYM LEADER of  this town.
I'm training to use POISON POKéMON  as well as my father.

FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_Koga: When afflicted by TOXIC, a POKéMON  suffers more and more.
It suffers worsening damage as the  battle wears on!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_GiveTM06: Now that you have the SOULBADGE,  the DEFENSE of your POKéMON rises.
It also lets you SURF outside of  battle.
Sealed within that TM06 lies  TOXIC!
It is a secret technique dating  back some four hundred years.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_Phil: You impressed me!  Here's a hint!
Look very closely for gaps in the  invisible walls!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_Edgar: I still have much to learn.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_Kirk: Even though I've lost, I will keep  training according to the teachings  of KOGA, my ninja master.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_Shawn: Where there is light, there is  shadow!
Light and shadow!  Which do you choose?
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_Kayden: So, you mix brawn with brains?  Good strategy!
That's remarkable for a child  TRAINER.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_Nate: I like poison and sleep techniques,  as they linger after battle!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuy: FUCHSIA GYM is a tricked-up place.  It's riddled with invisible walls!
KOGA might appear close, but he's  blocked off.
You have to find gaps in the walls  to reach him.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuyPostVi: It's amazing how ninja can terrify,  even now!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KogaIntro: A mere child like you dares to  challenge me?
The very idea makes me shiver  with mirth!
Very well, I shall show you true  terror as a ninja master.
Poison brings steady doom.  Sleep renders foes helpless.
Despair to the creeping horror of  POISON-type POKéMON!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KogaDefeat: Humph!  You have proven your worth!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KogaPostBattle: When afflicted by TOXIC, a POKéMON  suffers more and more.
It suffers worsening damage as the  battle wears on!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KogaExplainSoulBadg: Now that you have the SOULBADGE,  the DEFENSE of your POKéMON rises.
It also lets you SURF outside of  battle.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KogaExplainTM06: Sealed within that TM06 lies  TOXIC!
It is a secret technique dating  back some four hundred years.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KaydenIntro: Strength isn't the key for POKéMON.  Do you understand this?
I'll show you how strategy can  beat brute strength.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KaydenPostBattle: So, you mix brawn with brains?  Good strategy!
That's remarkable for a child  TRAINER.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KirkIntro: I was a magician once upon a time.
But I dreamt of becoming a ninja,  so I joined this GYM.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_KirkPostBattle: Even though I've lost, I will keep  training according to the teachings  of KOGA, my ninja master.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_NateIntro: Let's see you beat my special  techniques!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_NatePostBattle: I like poison and sleep techniques,  as they linger after battle!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_PhilIntro: The famed invisible walls of  FUCHSIA GYM have you frustrated?
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_PhilPostBattle: You impressed me!  Here's a hint!
Look very closely for gaps in the  invisible walls!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_EdgarIntro: I also study the way of the ninja  with Master KOGA!
Ninja have a long history of using  animals!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_EdgarPostBattle: I still have much to learn.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_ShawnIntro: Master KOGA comes from a long line  of ninjas.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_ShawnDefeat: You're more skilled than I'd  thought!
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_ShawnPostBattle: Where there is light, there is  shadow!
Light and shadow!  Which do you choose?
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_GymGuyAdvice: FUCHSIA GYM is a tricked-up place.  It's riddled with invisible walls!
KOGA might appear close, but he's  blocked off.
You have to find gaps in the walls  to reach him.
FuchsiaCity_Gym_Text_GymGuyPostVictory: It's amazing how ninja can terrify,  even now!

FuchsiaCity_House1_EventScript_Woman: The SAFARI ZONE's WARDEN is old,   but he's still very much active.
All his teeth are false, though.
FuchsiaCity_House1_EventScript_OldMan: He always liked collecting things,  even as a child!
FuchsiaCity_House1_EventScript_LittleBoy: BILL files his own POKéMON data on  his PC.

FuchsiaCity_House2_EventScript_FishingGu: I'm the FISHING GURU's older  brother.
I simply looove fishing!  I can't bear to go without.
Tell me, do you like to fish?
FuchsiaCity_House2_EventScript_GiveGoodR: Grand! I like your style.  I think we can be friends.
Take this and fish, young friend!
Fishing is a way of life!  It is like the finest poetry.
A crummy OLD ROD could only catch  MAGIKARP, yes?
But with a GOOD ROD, you can  catch much better POKéMON.
FuchsiaCity_House2_EventScript_NoRoomFor: I had a gift for you, but you have  no room for it!

FuchsiaCity_Mart_EventScript_Gentleman: Don't they have any pennants  promoting the SAFARI ZONE?
How about some paper lanterns?  Aren't there even any calendars?

FuchsiaCity_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript: You can't become a good TRAINER  with just one strong POKéMON.
But raising many POKéMON evenly  is no easy task, either.
There's a narrow trail west of  VIRIDIAN CITY.
It goes to the POKéMON LEAGUE HQ.  The HQ governs all TRAINERS.
If you're working on a POKéDEX,  visit the SAFARI ZONE.
All sorts of rare POKéMON breed  there.
FuchsiaCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CantBe: You can't become a good TRAINER  with just one strong POKéMON.
But raising many POKéMON evenly  is no easy task, either.

It goes to the POKéMON LEAGUE HQ.  The HQ governs all TRAINERS.
FuchsiaCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_VisitS: If you're working on a POKéDEX,  visit the SAFARI ZONE.
All sorts of rare POKéMON breed  there.

FuchsiaCity_SafariZone_Entrance_EventScr: Did you catch your fair share?  Come again!
Did you catch your fair share?  Come again!
Are you going to leave the  SAFARI ZONE early?
Please return any SAFARI BALLS  you may have left.
Good luck!
Welcome to the SAFARI ZONE!
For just ¥500, you can play the  SAFARI GAME.
You can roam the wide-open safari  and catch what you like.
Would you like to play?
Okay.  Please come again!
That'll be ¥500, please!
We only use a special kind of   POKé BALLS here.
We'll call you on the PA when you  run out of time or SAFARI BALLS.
Well, I'll wish you the best of  luck!
Oops!  Not enough money!
Hi! Is it your first time here at  the SAFARI ZONE?
Sorry, you're a regular here!
The SAFARI ZONE actually has  four zones in it.
Each zone has different kinds of  POKéMON, even some rare ones.
Use the supplied SAFARI BALLS to  catch them.
You can also throw BAIT or ROCKS  besides the SAFARI BALLS.
If you throw BAIT, the POKéMON  becomes less likely to flee, but  harder to catch.
If you throw ROCKS, the POKéMON  becomes more likely to flee, but  easier to catch.
When you run out of time or SAFARI  BALLS, it's game over for you!
FuchsiaCity_SafariZone_Entrance_Text_Pla: For just ¥500, you can play the  SAFARI GAME.
You can roam the wide-open safari  and catch what you like.

FuchsiaCity_SafariZone_Office_EventScrip: You know, he has that vacant look  like a SLOWPOKE.
WARDEN SLOWPOKE is very  knowledgeable about POKéMON.
He even has some fossils of rare,  extinct POKéMON.
WARDEN SLOWPOKE came in, but  I couldn't understand him.
I think he's got a speech problem!
WARDEN SLOWPOKE is running a  promotion campaign right now.
Try to get to the farthest corner  of the SAFARI ZONE.
If you can make it, you'll win a  very convenient prize.

IndigoPlateau_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScri: From here on, you face the  ELITE FOUR one by one.
If you win, a door opens to the  next TRAINER. Good luck!
I am so sorry, but you've wasted  your time coming here.
LORELEI of the ELITE FOUR is  absent, you see.
As a result, the POKéMON LEAGUE is  closed for the time being.
From here on, you face the  ELITE FOUR one by one.
If you win, a door opens to the  next TRAINER. Good luck!
At the POKéMON LEAGUE, you will  face the ELITE FOUR all in a row.
If you lose, you have to start all  over again!
This is it!  Go for it!

IndigoPlateau_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Agat: AGATHA's GHOST-type POKéMON are  horrifically terrifying in toughness.
I took my FIGHTING-type POKéMON  and raised them to the max.
I went at AGATHA feeling pretty  confident, but she whupped us.
That old lady's also got a really  short fuse, too.
It doesn't take anything to get  that scary lady hollering.
IndigoPlateau_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Lanc: Maybe becoming an ELITE FOUR  member is in the blood.
From what I've heard, LANCE has  a cousin who's a GYM LEADER  somewhere far away.

LavenderTown_Mart_EventScript_BaldingMan: I'm searching for items that raise  the stats of POKéMON.
They're effective over the course  of a single battle.
X ATTACK, X DEFEND, X SPEED,   and X SPECIAL are what I'm after.
Do you know where I can get them?

LavenderTown_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScrip: TEAM ROCKET will do anything for  the sake of money!
There is no job too dirty, no deed  too heinous, no crime too wicked!
I saw CUBONE's mother trying to  escape from TEAM ROCKET.
She was killed trying to get away…
You know how the CUBONE species  wears skulls, right?

OneIsland_EventScript_EnterOneIslandFirs: BILL: Here we are!  This is ONE ISLAND.
There are several islands around  here, and this is one of them.
My friend CELIO sent the boat to  fetch me here.
He's in charge of the island's PC  network by his lonesome.
…Why am I telling you this now?  Let's just go see CELIO!
OneIsland_EventScript_OldMan: Here we are on an island smack in  the middle of nowhere.
We're lucky to have an upstanding  young man like CELIO here.
My granddaughter was in a tizzy  over CELIO's friend.
I'm not sure what that means, but  CELIO is quite the man!
OneIsland_EventScript_OldManLinkKanto: My granddaughter was in a tizzy  over a new breakthrough.
She said we now have PC linkage  with people in KANTO.
I'm not sure what that means, but  CELIO is quite the man!
OneIsland_EventScript_OldManLinkHoenn: My granddaughter was in a tizzy  over a new breakthrough.
She said we finally have PC linkage  with people in HOENN.
I'm not sure what that means, but  CELIO is quite the man.
He would make a fine husband for  my granddaughter!

But I want to stay here forever!

But I want to stay here forever!

OneIsland_KindleRoad_EventScript_EmberSp: Light the Fire in Your Heart!  EMBER SPA
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_MariaIntro: The weather's gorgeous!  Perfect for a battle!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_MariaPostBattl: Please don't splash my face!  You'll ruin the makeup.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_AbigailIntro: I'm beginning to get a sunburn…
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_AbigailPostBat: I like that cap you have.  Maybe I should wear one, too…
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_FinnIntro: Seen from here, MT. EMBER towers  into the sky.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_FinnPostBattle: The sky is immense around these  parts.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_GarrettIntro: I took a break from swimming,  only to have you challenge me?
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_GarrettDefeat: Hey, what the…  You're good, you!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_GarrettPostBat: Instead of using SURF all the time,  you should swim some.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_TommyIntro: Wait! Wait a second!  I think I've hooked a big one!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_TommyPostBattl: Not only did I lose, the big one  got away from me, too!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_SharonIntro: Could you help me out with my  training?
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_SharonDefeat: You were a cut above me.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_SharonPostBatt: It's clear that you're skilled.  I like you!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_TanyaIntro: There isn't a day in which we don't  train!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_TanyaPostBattl: I'll train even harder from now on!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_SheaIntro: Every morning, before breakfast,  I swim around this island.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_SheaPostBattle: I lost because I'm pooped from all  the running I did…
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_HughIntro: Dress appropriately for battle!  Lose that frivolous outfit!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_HughPostBattle: Even martial artists are becoming  fashion conscious these days…
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_BryceIntro: You know, everything tastes great  when you're out in the wild.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_BrycePostBattl: The water in volcanic regions is  delicious.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_ClaireIntro: My lunch filled us up, so will you  battle us for some exercise?
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_ClairePostBatt: What should I do?  I feel famished again.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_KiaIntro: KIA: My big brother and I make  an awesome combination!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_KiaDefeat: KIA: Huh?!  I can't believe it!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_KiaPostBattle: KIA: How could there be anyone  better than my big brother?
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_KiaNotEnoughMo: KIA: If you want to battle with  us, you have to bring at least two  POKéMON with you.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_MikIntro: MIK: Together with KIA, I'm afraid  of nothing!
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_MikPostBattle: MIK: How could my combination  with KIA fail?
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_MikNotEnoughMo: MIK: Hey, do you want to battle  with us two?
Bring two or more POKéMON with  you, then.
OneIsland_KindleRoad_Text_EmberSpaSign: Light the Fire in Your Heart!  EMBER SPA

OneIsland_KindleRoad_EmberSpa_EventScrip: Hm!  Haaaaaaaaaaah!
Aaaah! This is heavenly!  The water warms me to my core!
You should jump in, too.
Go to the middle, relax, and get  good and warm!
My favorite part of bathing comes  up right after this.
I enjoy a bowl of chowder to  warm me from the inside, too!
Soaking in a hot spring pool is  therapeutic, people say.
Have a look at my face.  See how smooth my skin is?
The hot spring's water keeps my  skin younger than my age.
After an honest day of training,  nothing beats a relaxing soak in  the hot spring pool.
BRUNO, who's a senior ahead of me,  visits the SPA on occasion.
He comes to rehab injuries, both  his own and his POKéMON's.
Hot springs go hand-in-hand with  volcanoes.
The EMBER SPA here, well,  I made it years ago.
I hewed the pool right out of a  gigantic boulder by hand.
I was using this at the time.  I suppose I can part with it.
That shatters boulders as if they  were made of crackers.
That shatters boulders as if they  were made of crackers.
The water is perfectly warm.  It feels exquisite…
[Player] and the POKéMON were  fully refreshed!

OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_M: BILL: Hey, there!  CELIO!
CELIO: BILL!  I can't believe you came out here.
BILL: Well, absolutely!  How's your research coming along?
…Oh, wait a sec.
[Player], this is my buddy CELIO.  He's one dedicated PC MANIAC!
CELIO: That's really impressive.
I hate to say it, but I have zero  aptitude for battling.
Anyways, I'm glad to meet you.
BILL: So, bring me up to speed.  How's your machine running?
CELIO: It's running fine, but we're  too remote out here.
The PCs on this island just can't  link with your PC, BILL.
BILL: Oh, yeah?  Okay, let me take a look-see.
…Hang on here…  I think we can make it work.  Let me help you, okay?
[Player], can I get you to wait for  me just a bit?
…Actually, can I get you to do  me a favor?
The island next to this one's  called TWO ISLAND.
There's a guy there that runs  a GAME CORNER.
He has this thing for rare rocks  and gems.
We keep in touch, being fellow  maniacs.
So, can I get you to deliver this  METEORITE to him?
CELIO: [Player], if you are going  to TWO ISLAND, please take this.
It's a PASS for the ferry service  serving the local islands.
It will let you travel between the  ISLANDS ONE, TWO, and THREE.
Oh, you should have this, too.
BILL: I'll catch you later!  Say hi to the guy for me!
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_I: CELIO, this is [Player], the  reigning POKéMON CHAMP!
CELIO, this is [Player], a rising  contender as the POKéMON CHAMP!
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_B: How about we try this like this…
Did you see?  We got the PC working!
I've got a few things to show  CELIO here.
Can you go out on a stroll or  something for a while more?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_C: I'm sorry for taking up so much of  BILL's time.
I'm also sorry for being such a   poor host on your visit here.
CELIO: Hello!
[Player], I've been hearing rumors  about you.
[Player], is there anything that  you can't stand?
Apparently, BILL simply can't  stomach milk at all.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_B: [Player], what's your favorite kind  of POKéMON?
BILL is a POKéMANIAC, so he loves  every kind.
Apparently, the first one he caught  was an ABRA.
By the way, [Player], you're from  PALLET TOWN, aren't you?
I've heard that it's a quiet and  pleasant place.
BILL's hometown is GOLDENROD CITY,  where his folks still live.
I've heard that it's quite the  festive, bustling city.
I'd like to go there one day.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_C: I…  I'm not crying.
That's enough about me!
[Player], you're going to keep  looking for exotic POKéMON, right?
I wish you the best of luck!
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_G: CELIO: So this is the gem that  forms a pair with the RUBY…
[Player], you've gone through a lot  to get this, didn't you?
You don't have to tell me. I know  it wasn't easy.
Thank you so much!
Now it's my turn to work for you!  Please give me a little time.
Okay, this is good…
I did it!  I linked up with LANETTE!
[Player]…  [Player], I did it!
I've managed to link up with  TRAINERS in the HOENN region!
Finally, the Network Machine is  fully operational!
[Player], I owe it all to you!
Thanks to you, my dream came  true…
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_E: This is my own ferry PASS.
It will let you get to all the  SEVII ISLANDS.
[Player], please, I can't do  it without your help.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_G: Oh!  Th-that's…
Thank you!  [Player], you're simply amazing.
Um… May I ask one more giant favor  of you?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_D: It… It's not anything weird.  Please, I need your help.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_G: While I was studying gemstones,  I discovered something important.
There is another gem that forms  a pair with this RUBY.
That other gemstone is supposed to  be in the SEVII ISLANDS.
[Player], please, I need you to go  find the other gem.
[Player], may I have your ferry  PASS and the TOWN MAP?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_C: I was trying to find the gem  even while I was studying.
As a result, I've made no headway  in both my search and studies…
If I relied on BILL, I'm sure my  research would progress.
But this time, I want to try to do  things by myself.
CELIO: [Player], how have things  been for you?
Oh, is that right?  You've caught more POKéMON.
Do you know what?  Maybe I can be useful to you.
I'm modifying the Network Machine  right now.
I'm changing it so it can handle  trades over long distances.
When I get finished, you'll be  trading for exotic POKéMON from  TRAINERS far away.
But, there is a slight catch.
For the link to work, the Machine  needs a special gemstone.
It's supposed to be on ONE ISLAND,  but I haven't found one yet.
Who knows where it could be.
CELIO: Hello!  You look awfully busy as always.
How am I doing?
Well, I'm modifying my Network  Machine.
When I get done with the machine,  I hope you'll be first to use it,  [Player].
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_L: Oh, you're a stranger here!  Hi! Where did you come from?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_H: On this island, there's an enormous  volcano.
It hasn't erupted lately, so why  not enjoy a hike?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_C: I wish I could trade POKéMON with  my boyfriend who lives far away…
I traded POKéMON with my boyfriend  far away!
Everyone's saying that we can  thank you and CELIO.
So, thank you!
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_N: Link established with the KANTO  region.
Link established with the KANTO  and HOENN regions.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_L: BILL: What kept you so long?  Been out having a good time?
We got it done.  The PCs are up and running!
CELIO: The job went incredibly  quick.
BILL: No, no! There was almost  nothing left for me to do.
CELIO, I have to hand it to you.  You've learned a lot.
BILL: Well, there you have it.  I'm finished with the job.  We should head back to KANTO.
CELIO, I'll be seeing you again.
CELIO: [Player], I'm really sorry  that we sent you off alone today.
I promise, I will show you around  these islands sometime.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CelioCan: CELIO: BILL!  I can't believe you came out here.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_BillHows: BILL: Well, absolutely!  How's your research coming along?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_ThisIsMy: [Player], this is my buddy CELIO.  He's one dedicated PC MANIAC!
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_PlayerIs: CELIO, this is [Player], a rising  contender as the POKéMON CHAMP!
CELIO, this is [Player], the  reigning POKéMON CHAMP!
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CelioTha: I hate to say it, but I have zero  aptitude for battling.
Anyways, I'm glad to meet you.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_BillBrin: BILL: So, bring me up to speed.  How's your machine running?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CelioPCs: CELIO: It's running fine, but we're  too remote out here.
The PCs on this island just can't  link with your PC, BILL.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_BillLetM: BILL: Oh, yeah?  Okay, let me take a look-see.
…Hang on here…  I think we can make it work.  Let me help you, okay?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CanYouDe: [Player], can I get you to wait for  me just a bit?
…Actually, can I get you to do  me a favor?
The island next to this one's  called TWO ISLAND.
There's a guy there that runs  a GAME CORNER.
He has this thing for rare rocks  and gems.
We keep in touch, being fellow  maniacs.
So, can I get you to deliver this  METEORITE to him?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CelioPle: CELIO: [Player], if you are going  to TWO ISLAND, please take this.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_PassLets: It's a PASS for the ferry service  serving the local islands.
It will let you travel between the  ISLANDS ONE, TWO, and THREE.
Oh, you should have this, too.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Received: [Player] received an extra page  for the TOWN MAP!
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_BillCatc: BILL: I'll catch you later!  Say hi to the guy for me!
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HmmHowAb: How about we try this like this…
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_GotPCWor: Did you see?  We got the PC working!
I've got a few things to show  CELIO here.
Can you go out on a stroll or  something for a while more?
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_SorryFor: I'm sorry for taking up so much of  BILL's time.
I'm also sorry for being such a   poor host on your visit here.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_UsualPCS: The usual PC services aren't  available…

It will let you get to all the  SEVII ISLANDS.
[Player], please, I can't do  it without your help.
OneIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_ThankYou: CELIO: So this is the gem that  forms a pair with the RUBY…
[Player], you've gone through a lot  to get this, didn't you?
You don't have to tell me. I know  it wasn't easy.
Now it's my turn to work for you!  Please give me a little time.

Finally, the Network Machine is  fully operational!

Thanks to you, my dream came  true…

BILL is a POKéMANIAC, so he loves  every kind.
Apparently, the first one he caught  was an ABRA.

I've heard that it's a quiet and  pleasant place.

PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_EventScript_: Recently, there have been sightings  of many rare POKéMON species.
I'm talking about POKéMON that  have never been seen in KANTO.
I would love to go see things for  myself, but I'm much too old.
Since I can't do it, [Player], I'd  like you to go in my place.
[Rival]: Hey, I heard that!
Gramps, what's with favoring  [Player] over me all the time?
I went and collected more POKéMON,  and faster, too.
You should just let me handle  everything.
OAK: I know, I know.  Of course I need your help, too.
Now, I need to see both your  POKéDEXES.
PROF. OAK took both POKéDEX  units.
…And that's done!
Now these units can record data on  a lot more POKéMON.
Now, [Player] and [Rival]!
This time, you really must work  towards filling your POKéDEXES.
I urge you to make them the best  and the most complete of all time!
Truly, this is a monumentally great  undertaking in POKéMON history!
[Rival]: Gramps, calm down.  Don't get so excited.
I'll get the POKéDEX completed,  don't you worry about a thing.
I think I'll try looking around  ONE ISLAND first…
Anyways, I'm outta here!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_ChooseStarte: [Rival]: Gramps!  I'm fed up with waiting!
Oh, that's right, I told you to  come! Just wait!
The POKéMON are held inside  these POKé BALLS.
When I was young, I was a serious  POKéMON TRAINER.
But now, in my old age, I have  only these three left.
You can have one.  Go on, choose!
[Rival]: Hey! Gramps! No fair!  What about me?
OAK: Be patient, [Rival].  You can have one, too!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_EventScript_: OAK: Hey!  Don't go away yet!
[Rival]: Wait, [Player]!  Let's check out our POKéMON!
Come on, I'll take you on!
[Rival]: Okay! I'll make my  POKéMON battle to toughen it up!
[Player]! Gramps!  Smell you later!
[Rival]: What, it's only [Player]?  Gramps isn't around.
[Rival]: Heh, I don't need to be  greedy like you. I'm mature!
Go ahead and choose, [Player]!
[Rival]: My POKéMON looks a lot  tougher than yours.
OAK: Now, [Player].
Inside those three POKé BALLS are  POKéMON.
Which one will you choose for  yourself?

OAK: [Player], raise your young  POKéMON by making it battle.
It has to battle for it to grow.
OAK: Oh, [Player]!  How is my old POKéMON?
Well, it seems to be growing more  attached to you.
You must be talented as a POKéMON  TRAINER.
What's that?  You have something for me?
Ah!   It's the custom POKé BALL!
I had it on order.  Thank you!
[Rival]: Gramps!
[Rival]: I almost forgot!  What did you call me for?
OAK: Oh, right!  I have a request for you two.
On the desk there is my invention,  the POKéDEX!
It automatically records data on  POKéMON you've seen or caught.
It's a high-tech encyclopedia!
OAK: [Player] and [Rival].  Take these with you.
OAK: You can't get detailed data  on POKéMON by just seeing them.
You must catch them to obtain  complete data.
So, here are some tools for  catching wild POKéMON.
When a wild POKéMON appears,  it's fair game.
Just throw a POKé BALL at it and  try to catch it!
This won't always work, however.
A healthy POKéMON can escape.  You have to be lucky!
To make a complete guide on all  the POKéMON in the world…
That was my dream!
But, I'm too old.  I can't get the job done.
So, I want you two to fulfill my  dream for me.
Get moving, you two.
This is a great undertaking in  POKéMON history!
[Rival]: All right, Gramps!  Leave it all to me!
[Player], I hate to say it, but you  won't be necessary for this.
I know! I'll borrow a TOWN MAP  from my sis!
I'll tell her not to lend you one,  [Player]! Hahaha!
Don't bother coming around to  my place after this!
Ah, now this is excellent!
[Player], I have another important  favor to ask of you.
I need you to listen closely.
Ah, [Player]!  How is your POKéDEX shaping up?
[Rival] has already caught some  POKéMON and added to the data.
So, [Player], let's have a look at  your POKéDEX.
…What's the matter?  You've added no new data at all.
I'll give you these, so do try a  little harder.
POKéMON around the world wait for  you, [Player]!
OAK: Come see me sometime.
After all, I want to know how your  POKéDEX is coming along.
Those are POKé BALLS.  They contain POKéMON!
I see! BULBASAUR is your choice.  It's very easy to raise.
So, [Player], you want to go with  the GRASS POKéMON BULBASAUR?
Hm! SQUIRTLE is your choice.  It's one worth raising.
So, [Player], you've decided on the  WATER POKéMON SQUIRTLE?
Ah! CHARMANDER is your choice.  You should raise it patiently.
So, [Player], you're claiming the  FIRE POKéMON CHARMANDER?
This POKéMON is really quite  energetic!
[Rival]: I'll take this one, then!
Those are POKé BALLS.  They contain POKéMON!
Those are POKé BALLS.  They contain POKéMON!
That's PROF. OAK's last POKéMON.
I study POKéMON as PROF. OAK's  AIDE.
PROF. OAK is going to have his own  radio show soon.
The program will be called PROF.  OAK's POKéMON SEMINAR.
I study POKéMON as PROF. OAK's  AIDE.
Hi, [Player]. I bet you've become  good friends with your POKéMON.
By the way, did you know about  DAISY?
If you show DAISY your POKéMON,  she can tell how much it likes you.
Occasionally, she will even groom  a POKéMON for you.
This is a secret, so please don't  tell anyone.

PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_Receive: [Player] received the POKéDEX  from PROF. OAK.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakCatc: OAK: You can't get detailed data  on POKéMON by just seeing them.
You must catch them to obtain  complete data.
So, here are some tools for  catching wild POKéMON.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakExpl: When a wild POKéMON appears,  it's fair game.
Just throw a POKé BALL at it and  try to catch it!
A healthy POKéMON can escape.  You have to be lucky!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakComp: To make a complete guide on all  the POKéMON in the world…
But, I'm too old.  I can't get the job done.
So, I want you two to fulfill my  dream for me.
This is a great undertaking in  POKéMON history!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakMons: POKéMON around the world wait for  you, [Player]!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakAdde: Ah, [Player]!  How is your POKéDEX shaping up?
[Rival] has already caught some  POKéMON and added to the data.
So, [Player], let's have a look at  your POKéDEX.
…What's the matter?  You've added no new data at all.
I'll give you these, so do try a  little harder.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakCome: After all, I want to know how your  POKéDEX is coming along.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_BlankEn: It's like an encyclopedia, but the  pages are blank.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_ThoseAr: Those are POKé BALLS.  They contain POKéMON!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_PressSt: Press START to open the MENU!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_SaveOpt: The SAVE option is on the MENU.  Use it regularly.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_AllMonT: All POKéMON types have strong and  weak points against others.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_EmailMe: Finally!  The ultimate TRAINERS of the  POKéMON LEAGUE are ready to  take on all comers!
Bring your best POKéMON and see  how you rate as a TRAINER!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_StudyAs: I study POKéMON as PROF. OAK's  AIDE.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_DaisyWi: Hi, [Player]. I bet you've become  good friends with your POKéMON.
By the way, did you know about  DAISY?
If you show DAISY your POKéMON,  she can tell how much it likes you.
Occasionally, she will even groom  a POKéMON for you.
This is a secret, so please don't  tell anyone.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakIsGo: PROF. OAK is going to have his own  radio show soon.
The program will be called PROF.  OAK's POKéMON SEMINAR.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakIsAu: PROF. OAK may not look like much,  but he's the authority on POKéMON.
Many POKéMON TRAINERS hold him in  high regard.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakFavo: [Player], I have another important  favor to ask of you.
I need you to listen closely.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakSigh: Recently, there have been sightings  of many rare POKéMON species.
I'm talking about POKéMON that  have never been seen in KANTO.
I would love to go see things for  myself, but I'm much too old.
Since I can't do it, [Player], I'd  like you to go in my place.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_RivalJu: Gramps, what's with favoring  [Player] over me all the time?
I went and collected more POKéMON,  and faster, too.
You should just let me handle  everything.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakNeed: OAK: I know, I know.  Of course I need your help, too.
Now, I need to see both your  POKéDEXES.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakTook: PROF. OAK took both POKéDEX  units.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakNowT: Now these units can record data on  a lot more POKéMON.
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_OakMust: This time, you really must work  towards filling your POKéDEXES.
I urge you to make them the best  and the most complete of all time!
Truly, this is a monumentally great  undertaking in POKéMON history!
PalletTown_ProfessorOaksLab_Text_RivalIl: [Rival]: Gramps, calm down.  Don't get so excited.
I'll get the POKéDEX completed,  don't you worry about a thing.
I think I'll try looking around  ONE ISLAND first…

PalletTown_RivalsHouse_EventScript_Daisy: My brother, [Rival], is out at  Grandpa's LAB.
PalletTown_RivalsHouse_EventScript_Heard: DAISY: [Player], I heard you had  a battle against [Rival].
PalletTown_RivalsHouse_EventScript_Groom: I'm about to have some tea.  Would you like to join me?
Oh, but look.  Your POKéMON are a little dirty.
Would you like me to groom one?
DAISY: Okay, I'll get it looking  nice in no time.
DAISY: There you go! All done.   looks dreamily content…
DAISY: There you go! All done.  See? Doesn't it look nice?
Giggle…  It's such a cute POKéMON.
PalletTown_RivalsHouse_EventScript_CantG: Oh, sorry. I honestly can't  groom an EGG.
PalletTown_RivalsHouse_EventScript_Decli: You don't need any grooming done?  Okay, we'll just have tea.
PalletTown_RivalsHouse_EventScript_RateM: DAISY: Your POKéMON grow to love  you if you raise them with love.
For example, [Player], may I see  your first POKéMON?
PalletTown_RivalsHouse_EventScript_MonFr: …Um, it's not easy for me to say  this, but…
Is there some reason why your  POKéMON would hate you so much?
[Player], I don't like the way it  glares at you.
Could you try being a little nicer  to it?
It's not quite familiar with you  yet.
POKéMON are all quite wary when  you first get them.
It's warming up to you.  Trust must be growing between you.
It's quite friendly with you.  Keep being good to it!
I wish [Rival] could see this and  learn something from it.
It couldn't possibly love you  any more than it does now.
Your POKéMON is happy beyond  words.
PalletTown_RivalsHouse_EventScript_Pleas: DAISY: Just like people, POKéMON  are living things.
When they get tired, please give  them a rest.

Gee, that's lazy of him.  Here, this will help you.

PewterCity_EventScript_GymGuide: BROCK's looking for new  challengers. Follow me!
If you have the right stuff,  go take on BROCK!
PewterCity_EventScript_GymGuideTrigger: BROCK's looking for new  challengers. Follow me!
If you have the right stuff,  go take on BROCK!
PewterCity_EventScript_Lass: CLEFAIRY came from the moon.  That's what the rumor is.
They appeared after MOON STONES  fell on MT. MOON.
PewterCity_EventScript_MuseumGuide: Did you check out the MUSEUM?
Really?  You absolutely have to go!
You have to pay to get in, but it's  worth it. See you around!
PewterCity_EventScript_CheckedOutMuseum: Weren't those fossils from MT. MOON  amazing?
PewterCity_EventScript_FatMan: There aren't many serious POKéMON  TRAINERS here.
They're all like BUG CATCHERS,  you know, just hobbyists.
But PEWTER GYM's BROCK isn't like  that, not one bit.
PewterCity_EventScript_BugCatcher: Psssst!  Do you know what I'm doing?
I'm spraying REPEL to keep wild  POKéMON out of my garden!
PewterCity_EventScript_TrainerTips: All POKéMON that appear in battle,  however briefly, earn EXP Points.
PewterCity_EventScript_PoliceNotice: Thieves have been stealing POKéMON  fossils from MT. MOON.
Please call the PEWTER POLICE if  you have any information.
PewterCity_EventScript_GymSign: PEWTER CITY POKéMON GYM  LEADER: BROCK  The Rock-Solid POKéMON TRAINER!
PewterCity_EventScript_CitySign: PEWTER CITY  A Stone Gray City
PewterCity_EventScript_AideGiveRunningSh: I'm glad I caught up to you.  I'm PROF. OAK's AIDE.
I've been asked to deliver this,  so here you go.
[Player] switched shoes with the  RUNNING SHOES.
Press the B Button to run.  But only where there's room to run!
Well, I must be going back to  the LAB.
Here is a pair of RUNNING SHOES  for my beloved challenger.
Remember, I'll always cheer for  you! Don't ever give up!
Text_DreamEaterTeach: Yawn!  I must have dozed off in the sun.
I had this weird dream about  a DROWZEE eating my dream.
And…  I learned how to eat dreams…
Let me teach it to a POKéMON so  I can forget about it!
Text_DreamEaterWhichMon: Which POKéMON wants to learn  DREAM EATER?
PewterCity_Text_ClefairyCameFromMoon: CLEFAIRY came from the moon.  That's what the rumor is.
They appeared after MOON STONES  fell on MT. MOON.
PewterCity_Text_BrockOnlySeriousTrainerH: There aren't many serious POKéMON  TRAINERS here.
They're all like BUG CATCHERS,  you know, just hobbyists.
But PEWTER GYM's BROCK isn't like  that, not one bit.
PewterCity_Text_DidYouCheckOutMuseum: Did you check out the MUSEUM?
PewterCity_Text_WerentThoseFossilsAmazin: Weren't those fossils from MT. MOON  amazing?
PewterCity_Text_ReallyYouHaveToGo: Really?  You absolutely have to go!
PewterCity_Text_ThisIsTheMuseum: You have to pay to get in, but it's  worth it. See you around!
PewterCity_Text_DoYouKnowWhatImDoing: Psssst!  Do you know what I'm doing?
PewterCity_Text_SprayingRepelToKeepWildM: I'm spraying REPEL to keep wild  POKéMON out of my garden!
PewterCity_Text_BrocksLookingForChalleng: BROCK's looking for new  challengers. Follow me!
PewterCity_Text_GoTakeOnBrock: If you have the right stuff,  go take on BROCK!
PewterCity_Text_TrainerTipsEarningEXP: All POKéMON that appear in battle,  however briefly, earn EXP Points.
PewterCity_Text_CallPoliceIfInfoOnThieve: Thieves have been stealing POKéMON  fossils from MT. MOON.
Please call the PEWTER POLICE if  you have any information.
PewterCity_Text_GymSign: PEWTER CITY POKéMON GYM  LEADER: BROCK  The Rock-Solid POKéMON TRAINER!
PewterCity_Text_CitySign: PEWTER CITY  A Stone Gray City
PewterCity_Text_DefeatedBrockYouCanHaveT: あッれー！  その　ジムバッジ‥‥  すげえな　タケシに　かったのかよ！
かんどう　したから  おれの　たからもの　やるよ！
PewterCity_Text_BerriesInsideUseCarefull: なかには　きのみが　はいってるぜ
やくに　たつ　きのみも  はいって　いるから  だいじに　つかって　くれよ！
PewterCity_Text_MonsWillUseHeldBerriesOn: ポケモンに　きのみを  もたせて　おけば  たたかっている　ときに  かってに　つかって　くれるんだ
キズぐすり　とか　どくけし　より  てがるで　べんり　だろ？
PewterCity_Text_AskedToDeliverThis: I'm glad I caught up to you.  I'm PROF. OAK's AIDE.
I've been asked to deliver this,  so here you go.
PewterCity_Text_ReceivedRunningShoesFrom: [Player] received the  RUNNING SHOES from the AIDE.
PewterCity_Text_SwitchedShoesWithRunning: [Player] switched shoes with the  RUNNING SHOES.
PewterCity_Text_ExplainRunningShoes: Press the B Button to run.  But only where there's room to run!
PewterCity_Text_MustBeGoingBackToLab: Well, I must be going back to  the LAB.
PewterCity_Text_RunningShoesLetterFromMo: Here is a pair of RUNNING SHOES  for my beloved challenger.
Remember, I'll always cheer for  you! Don't ever give up!

PewterCity_Gym_EventScript_Brock: There are all kinds of TRAINERS in  this huge world of ours.
You appear to be very gifted as a  POKéMON TRAINER.
So let me make a suggestion.
Go to the GYM in CERULEAN and test  your abilities.
PewterCity_Gym_EventScript_GiveTM39: A TM, Technical Machine, contains a  technique for POKéMON.
Using a TM teaches the move it  contains to a POKéMON.
A TM is good for only one use.
So, when you use one, pick the  POKéMON carefully.
It hurls boulders at the foe and  lowers its SPEED.
PewterCity_Gym_EventScript_NoRoomForTM39: You don't have room for this.
PewterCity_Gym_EventScript_Liam: You're pretty hot.  …But not as hot as BROCK!
PewterCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuy: Hiya!  Do you want to dream big?
Do you dare to dream of becoming  the POKéMON champ?
I'm no TRAINER, but I can advise  you on how to win.
Let me take you to the top!
PewterCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuyPostVic: Just as I thought!  You're POKéMON champ material!
PewterCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuyDontTak: It's a free service!  Let's get happening!
PewterCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuyAdvice: The first POKéMON out in a match is  at the left of the POKéMON LIST.
By changing the order of POKéMON,  you may gain an advantage.
Try different orders to suit your  opponent's party.
PewterCity_Gym_Text_BrockIntro: So, you're here. I'm BROCK.  I'm PEWTER's GYM LEADER.
My rock-hard willpower is evident  even in my POKéMON.
My POKéMON are all rock hard, and  have true-grit determination.
That's right - my POKéMON are all  the ROCK type!
Fuhaha! You're going to challenge  me knowing that you'll lose?
That's the TRAINER's honor that  compels you to challenge me.
Fine, then!  Show me your best!
PewterCity_Gym_Text_BrockDefeat: I took you for granted, and so  I lost.
As proof of your victory, I confer  on you this…the official POKéMON  LEAGUE BOULDERBADGE.
Just having the BOULDERBADGE makes  your POKéMON more powerful.
It also enables the use of the  move FLASH outside of battle.
Of course, a POKéMON must know the  move FLASH to use it.
PewterCity_Gym_Text_ExplainTM39: A TM, Technical Machine, contains a  technique for POKéMON.
Using a TM teaches the move it  contains to a POKéMON.
A TM is good for only one use.
So, when you use one, pick the  POKéMON carefully.
It hurls boulders at the foe and  lowers its SPEED.
PewterCity_Gym_Text_BrockPostBattle: There are all kinds of TRAINERS in  this huge world of ours.
You appear to be very gifted as a  POKéMON TRAINER.
So let me make a suggestion.
Go to the GYM in CERULEAN and test  your abilities.
PewterCity_Gym_Text_DontHaveRoomForThis: You don't have room for this.
PewterCity_Gym_Text_LiamIntro: You're ten thousand light-years   from facing BROCK!
PewterCity_Gym_Text_LiamDefeat: Light-years isn't time…  It measures distance!
PewterCity_Gym_Text_LiamPostBattle: You're pretty hot.  …But not as hot as BROCK!
PewterCity_Gym_Text_LetMeTakeYouToTheTop: Hiya!  Do you want to dream big?
Do you dare to dream of becoming  the POKéMON champ?
I'm no TRAINER, but I can advise  you on how to win.
Let me take you to the top!
PewterCity_Gym_Text_TryDifferentPartyOrd: The first POKéMON out in a match is  at the left of the POKéMON LIST.
By changing the order of POKéMON,  you may gain an advantage.
Try different orders to suit your  opponent's party.
PewterCity_Gym_Text_ItsFreeLetsGetHappen: It's a free service!  Let's get happening!
PewterCity_Gym_Text_YoureChampMaterial: Just as I thought!  You're POKéMON champ material!

PewterCity_House1_EventScript_BaldingMan: Our POKéMON's an outsider, so it's  finicky and hard to handle.
An outsider is a POKéMON that you  get in a trade.
It grows fast, but it may ignore an  unskilled TRAINER in battle.
If only we had some BADGES…
PewterCity_House1_Text_TradeMonsAreFinic: Our POKéMON's an outsider, so it's  finicky and hard to handle.
An outsider is a POKéMON that you  get in a trade.
It grows fast, but it may ignore an  unskilled TRAINER in battle.
If only we had some BADGES…

PewterCity_House2_EventScript_OldMan: POKéMON learn new techniques as  they grow.
But some moves must be taught to  them by people.
PewterCity_House2_EventScript_LittleBoy: A POKéMON becomes easier to   catch if it has a status problem.
Sleep, poison, burn, or paralysis…  Those are all effective.
But catching POKéMON is never  a sure thing!
PewterCity_House2_Text_MonsLearnTechniqu: POKéMON learn new techniques as  they grow.
But some moves must be taught to  them by people.
PewterCity_House2_Text_MonsEasierCatchIf: A POKéMON becomes easier to   catch if it has a status problem.
Sleep, poison, burn, or paralysis…  Those are all effective.
But catching POKéMON is never  a sure thing!

PewterCity_Mart_EventScript_Youngster: A shady old guy sucked me into  buying this weird fish POKéMON!
It's totally weak and it cost ¥500!
PewterCity_Mart_EventScript_Boy: Good things can happen if you raise  POKéMON diligently.
Even the weak ones can surprise  you if you don't give up on them.
PewterCity_Mart_Text_BoughtWeirdFishFrom: A shady old guy sucked me into  buying this weird fish POKéMON!
It's totally weak and it cost ¥500!
PewterCity_Mart_Text_GoodThingsIfRaiseMo: Good things can happen if you raise  POKéMON diligently.
Even the weak ones can surprise  you if you don't give up on them.

PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_Scienti: You can't sneak in the back way!  Nice try, kid, but no.
Oh, whatever!  Do you know what AMBER is?
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_AmberHa: AMBER contains the genetic matter  of ancient POKéMON.
There's a LAB somewhere trying to  resurrect POKéMON from AMBER.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_Explain: AMBER is actually sap, that gooey  stuff that oozes from trees.
The ancient sap fossilized over  time to become rock-hard AMBER.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_Entranc: Yes, yes.  It's ¥50 for a child's ticket.
Would you like to come in?
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_Scienti: We have two fossils of rare,  prehistoric POKéMON on exhibit.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_OldMan: I should be grateful for my long  life.
Never did I think I would get to  see the bones of a dragon!
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_OldAmbe: Ssh! Listen, I need to share a  secret with someone.
I think that this chunk of AMBER  contains POKéMON DNA!
It would be a shattering scientific  breakthrough if POKéMON could be  resurrected from it.
But, my colleagues just ignore  what I have to say.
So, I have a favor to ask!
I want you to get this examined at  a POKéMON LAB somewhere.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_NoRoomF: You don't have space for this.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_Already: Ssh!  Get the OLD AMBER checked!
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_OldAmbe: There is a beautiful piece of  AMBER in a clear gold color.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_Aerodac: AERODACTYL Fossil  A primitive and rare POKéMON.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_EventScript_Kabutop: KABUTOPS Fossil  A primitive and rare POKéMON.

Would you like to come in?

Oh, whatever!  Do you know what AMBER is?

Never did I think I would get to  see the bones of a dragon!

I think that this chunk of AMBER  contains POKéMON DNA!
It would be a shattering scientific  breakthrough if POKéMON could be  resurrected from it.
But, my colleagues just ignore  what I have to say.
So, I have a favor to ask!

PewterCity_Museum_1F_Text_DontHaveSpaceF: You don't have space for this.

PewterCity_Museum_1F_Text_BeautifulPiece: There is a beautiful piece of  AMBER in a clear gold color.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_Text_AerodactylFoss: AERODACTYL Fossil  A primitive and rare POKéMON.
PewterCity_Museum_1F_Text_KabutopsFossil: KABUTOPS Fossil  A primitive and rare POKéMON.

PewterCity_Museum_2F_EventScript_Man: What's so special about it?  Looks like an ordinary rock to me.
PewterCity_Museum_2F_EventScript_OldMan: Humankind first set foot on the  moon that day.
I bought a color TV just so I  could watch that news.
PewterCity_Museum_2F_EventScript_Scienti: This month, we're running a space  exhibit.
PewterCity_Museum_2F_EventScript_LittleG: I want a PIKACHU!  It's so cute!
I asked my daddy to catch me one!
PewterCity_Museum_2F_EventScript_Balding: Yeah, a PIKACHU soon, I promise!
PewterCity_Museum_2F_EventScript_MoonSto: A meteorite that fell on MT. MOON.  It is thought to be a MOON STONE.
Text_SeismicTossTeach: The secrets of space…  The mysteries of earth…
There are so many things about  which we know so little.
But that should spur us to study  harder, not toss in the towel.

PokemonLeague_ChampionsRoom_EventScript_: Why?  Why did I lose?
I never made any mistakes raising  my POKéMON…
Darn it! You're the new POKéMON  LEAGUE CHAMPION!
Although I don't like to admit it…
OAK: [Player]!
OAK: So, you've won!  Sincerely, congratulations!
You're the new POKéMON LEAGUE  CHAMPION!
You've grown up so much since you  first left with  to work  on the POKéDEX.
[Player], you have come of age!
OAK: [Rival]…  I'm disappointed in you.
I came when I heard you'd beaten  the ELITE FOUR.
But, when I got here, you had  already lost!
[Rival], do you understand why  you lost?
You have forgotten to treat your  POKéMON with love and trust.
Without them, you will never  become a CHAMP again!
OAK: [Player].
You understand that your victory  was not just your own doing.
The bond you share with your  POKéMON is marvelous.
[Player]!  Come with me!
[Rival]: Hey, [Player]!
I was looking forward to seeing  you, [Player].
My rival should be strong to keep  me sharp.
While working on my POKéDEX, I  looked all over for POKéMON.
Not only that, I assembled teams  that would beat any POKéMON type.
And now…
I'm the POKéMON LEAGUE CHAMPION!
[Player]!  Do you know what that means?
I'll tell you.
I am the most powerful TRAINER in  the world!
[Rival]: Hey, [Player]!
You came back, [Player]!  Hahah, that is so great!
My rival should be strong to keep  me sharp.

RockTunnel_B1F_EventScript_Allen: In mountains, you'll often find  ROCK-type POKéMON.
RockTunnel_B1F_EventScript_Eric: I'll raise my POKéMON to beat  yours, kid.
RockTunnel_B1F_EventScript_Cooper: When you finish your POKéDEX,  can I have it?
RockTunnel_B1F_EventScript_Steve: POKéMON cosplay is dressing up as  POKéMON for fun.
RockTunnel_B1F_EventScript_Winston: I'm an artist, not a fighter.  I'll go home to draw.
RockTunnel_B1F_Text_SofiaIntro: Do you know how you can avoid  getting lost in the mountains?
You can bend twigs as trail  markers.
RockTunnel_B1F_Text_DudleyIntro: Hahaha!  Can you beat my power?
RockTunnel_B1F_Text_DudleyPostBattle: I go for power because I hate  thinking.
RockTunnel_B1F_Text_CooperIntro: You have a POKéDEX?  I want one, too.

RockTunnel_B1F_Text_SteveIntro: Um… Do you know about POKéMON  cosplay?

RockTunnel_B1F_Text_AllenIntro: My POKéMON techniques will leave  you crying!
RockTunnel_B1F_Text_AllenDefeat: I give!  You're a better technician!
RockTunnel_B1F_Text_AllenPostBattle: In mountains, you'll often find  ROCK-type POKéMON.
RockTunnel_B1F_Text_MarthaIntro: I don't often come here, but I will  battle you.

RockTunnel_B1F_Text_EricIntro: Hit me with your best shot!
RockTunnel_B1F_Text_EricPostBattle: I'll raise my POKéMON to beat  yours, kid.

RockTunnel_B1F_Text_WinstonPostBattle: I'm an artist, not a fighter.  I'll go home to draw.

RocketHideout_B1F_EventScript_Grunt1: Blast it… You're dissing TEAM  ROCKET, aren't you?
RocketHideout_B1F_EventScript_Grunt2: You're not going to get away with  this, brat!
RocketHideout_B1F_EventScript_Grunt3: SILPH SCOPE? Humph!  I don't know where it is.
RocketHideout_B1F_EventScript_Grunt4: Okay, I'll talk…  Take the elevator to see my BOSS.
RocketHideout_B1F_EventScript_Grunt5: Uh-oh, that ruckus somehow opened  the door!
RocketHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt1Intro: Who are you?  How did you get here?
RocketHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt1PostBattle: Blast it… You're dissing TEAM  ROCKET, aren't you?
RocketHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt2Intro: You broke into TEAM ROCKET's  operation? What nerve!
RocketHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt2PostBattle: You're not going to get away with  this, brat!
RocketHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt3PostBattle: SILPH SCOPE? Humph!  I don't know where it is.
RocketHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt4PostBattle: Okay, I'll talk…  Take the elevator to see my BOSS.
RocketHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt5Intro: Are you lost, you little mouse?
RocketHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt5PostBattle: Uh-oh, that ruckus somehow opened  the door!

RocketHideout_B2F_EventScript_Grunt: The TEAM ROCKET HQ has four  underground floors.
Think you can reach the BOSS?
RocketHideout_B2F_Text_GruntIntro: BOSS said you can see ghosts with  the SILPH SCOPE.
RocketHideout_B2F_Text_GruntPostBattle: The TEAM ROCKET HQ has four  underground floors.
Think you can reach the BOSS?

RocketHideout_B3F_EventScript_Grunt1: SILPH SCOPE?  Oh, that machine the BOSS stole.
RocketHideout_B3F_EventScript_Grunt2: But you can't run the elevator  without the LIFT KEY.
RocketHideout_B3F_Text_Grunt1Intro: Stop meddling in TEAM ROCKET's  affairs or else!
RocketHideout_B3F_Text_Grunt1PostBattle: SILPH SCOPE?  Oh, that machine the BOSS stole.
RocketHideout_B3F_Text_Grunt2Intro: We got word from upstairs that you  were coming!
RocketHideout_B3F_Text_Grunt2PostBattle: But you can't run the elevator  without the LIFT KEY.

RocketHideout_B4F_EventScript_Giovanni: I see that you raise POKéMON with  utmost care.
A child like you would never  understand what I hope to achieve.
I shall step aside this time!
RocketHideout_B4F_EventScript_Grunt1: Oh, no!  I dropped the LIFT KEY!
RocketHideout_B4F_EventScript_DefeatedGr: Oh, no!  I dropped the LIFT KEY!
RocketHideout_B4F_EventScript_Grunt2: Do you have something against TEAM  ROCKET?
RocketHideout_B4F_EventScript_Grunt3: BOSS!  I'm sorry I failed you!
RocketHideout_B4F_Text_GiovanniIntro: So! I must say, I am impressed you  got here.
TEAM ROCKET captures POKéMON from  around the world.
They're important tools for keeping  our criminal enterprise going.
For your insolence, you will feel a  world of pain!
RocketHideout_B4F_Text_GiovanniPostBattl: I see that you raise POKéMON with  utmost care.
A child like you would never  understand what I hope to achieve.
I shall step aside this time!
RocketHideout_B4F_Text_Grunt2Intro: I know you!  You ruined our plans at MT. MOON!
RocketHideout_B4F_Text_Grunt2PostBattle: Do you have something against TEAM  ROCKET?
RocketHideout_B4F_Text_Grunt3Intro: How can you not see the beauty of  our evil?
RocketHideout_B4F_Text_Grunt3PostBattle: BOSS!  I'm sorry I failed you!
RocketHideout_B4F_Text_Grunt1Intro: The elevator doesn't work?  Who has the LIFT KEY?
RocketHideout_B4F_Text_Grunt1PostBattle: Oh, no!  I dropped the LIFT KEY!

RocketHideout_Elevator_EventScript_NeedK: It appears to need a key.
RocketHideout_Elevator_Text_AppearsToNee: It appears to need a key.

Route1_EventScript_MartClerk: Hi!  I work at a POKéMON MART.
It's part of a convenient chain  selling all sorts of items.
Please, visit us in VIRIDIAN CITY.
I know, I'll give you a sample.  Here you go!
[Player] put the POTION away in  the BAG's ITEMS POCKET.
Route1_EventScript_AlreadyGotPotion: Please come see us if you need  POKé BALLS for catching POKéMON.
Route1_EventScript_Boy: See those ledges along the road?
It's a bit scary, but you can jump  from them.
You can get back to PALLET TOWN  quicker that way.
Route1_Text_WorkAtPokeMartTakeSample: Hi!  I work at a POKéMON MART.
It's part of a convenient chain  selling all sorts of items.
Please, visit us in VIRIDIAN CITY.
I know, I'll give you a sample.  Here you go!

Route1_Text_CanJumpFromLedges: See those ledges along the road?
It's a bit scary, but you can jump  from them.
You can get back to PALLET TOWN  quicker that way.

Route10_EventScript_NorthRockTunnelSign: ROCK TUNNEL  Detour to LAVENDER TOWN
Route10_Text_MarkIntro: Wow, you came all the way here?  Maybe you're a POKéMANIAC, too?  Want to see my collection?
Route10_Text_MarkPostBattle: I have more rare POKéMON at home!
Route10_Text_ClarkDefeat: Ha-haha!  Not laughing!  Ha-hay fever! Haha-ha-choo!
Route10_Text_HermanIntro: Hi, kid!  Want to see my POKéMON?
Route10_Text_HermanPostBattle: I don't like you.  I don't like anyone better than me!
Route10_Text_HeidiIntro: I've been out at a POKéMON GYM  a few times.
Route10_Text_HeidiPostBattle: I noticed some POKéMANIACS  prowling around.
Can you imagine? Them?  Up here in the mountains?
Route10_Text_TrentIntro: Ah!  This mountain air is delicious!
Route10_Text_TrentPostBattle: I feel bloated on mountain air!
Route10_Text_CarolIntro: I'm feeling a bit faint.  I haven't hiked in some time.
Route10_Text_CarolDefeat: I'm too tired.  I wasn't up for it.
Route10_Text_CarolPostBattle: The POKéMON here in the mountains  are so chunky…
I wish there were pink POKéMON  with a floral pattern!
Route10_Text_RockTunnelDetourToLavender: ROCK TUNNEL  Detour to LAVENDER TOWN

Route10_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_Fat: A NUGGET is totally useless.  So I sold it for ¥5000.
Route10_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_Gen: The types of POKéMON match up  differently with each other.
Every type is stronger than some  types and weaker than others.
Route10_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_You: I heard that ghosts haunt  LAVENDER TOWN.
Route10_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_Aid: Oh… [Player]!  I've been looking for you!
It's me, one of the ever-present  AIDES to PROF. OAK.
If your POKéDEX has complete data  on twenty species, I'm supposed to  give you a reward from PROF. OAK.
He entrusted me with this  EVERSTONE.
Have you gathered data on at least  twenty kinds of POKéMON?
Great! You have caught or owned   kinds of POKéMON!
Making POKéMON evolve certainly  can add to the POKéDEX.
However, at times, you may not  want a certain POKéMON to evolve.
In that case, give the EVERSTONE  to that POKéMON.
It will prevent evolution according  to the PROFESSOR.

Route11_Text_HugoPostBattle: POKéMON is life!  And to live is to play games!
Route11_Text_JasperPostBattle: You can't be a coward in the world  of POKéMON!
Route11_Text_EddiePostBattle: I did my best.  I have no regrets.
Route11_Text_BraxtonIntro: Careful!  I'm laying down some cables!
Route11_Text_BraxtonPostBattle: Spread the word to save energy!
Route11_Text_DillonIntro: I just became a TRAINER.  But, I think I can win.
Route11_Text_DillonDefeat: My POKéMON couldn't win…  Haven't they grown enough?
Route11_Text_DirkPostBattle: You were just lucky, that's all.
Route11_Text_YasuIntro: I'm the best in my class.  I train every morning.
Route11_Text_YasuDefeat: Darn!  My POKéMON need to be stronger!
Route11_Text_YasuPostBattle: There's a fat POKéMON that comes  down from the mountains.
I bet it'd be strong if you can  catch it.
Route11_Text_BerniePostBattle: Well, better get back to work.
Route11_Text_DaveIntro: I raised my POKéMON carefully.  They should be ready by now!
Route11_Text_DavePostBattle: Tch…  I better go find stronger ones!

Route11_EastEntrance_1F_EventScript_TopG: Don't you think it's hard to think  up good names for POKéMON?
Especially if you've caught a  whole bunch?
In LAVENDER TOWN, there's a man  who rates POKéMON nicknames.
He can even help you rename your  POKéMON, too.
Route11_EastEntrance_1F_EventScript_Bott: If you're aiming to reach LAVENDER  TOWN, take ROCK TUNNEL.
You can get to ROCK TUNNEL from  CERULEAN CITY.

There are items on the ground that  may be hidden from view.

What it does is show the direction  where the item is.
Use it to get your bearings, then  search the suspect area by hand.

Route12_EventScript_Snorlax: Want to use the POKé FLUTE?
Route12_EventScript_FoughtSnorlax: SNORLAX calmed down.  It gave a huge yawn…  And returned to the mountains.
Route12_EventScript_SnorlaxNoPokeFlute: A POKéMON is sprawled out in  a deep and comfortable slumber.
Route12_Text_MonSprawledOutInSlumber: A POKéMON is sprawled out in  a deep and comfortable slumber.
Text_SnorlaxWokeUp: It attacked in a grumpy rage!
Text_SnorlaxReturnedToMountains: SNORLAX calmed down.  It gave a huge yawn…  And returned to the mountains.
Text_WantToUsePokeFlute: Want to use the POKé FLUTE?
Route12_Text_NedIntro: Yeah!  I got a bite here!
Route12_Text_ChipIntro: Be patient.  Fishing is a waiting game.
Route12_Text_ChipPostBattle: With a better ROD, I could catch  better POKéMON…
Route12_Text_JustinIntro: I'm searching for a MOON STONE.  Have you found one?
Route12_Text_JustinPostBattle: I could have made my POKéMON  evolve with a MOON STONE.
I would have won then, I bet.
Route12_Text_LucaIntro: I don't know a thing about POKéMON  of the sea, though.
Route12_Text_LucaPostBattle: Water conducts electricity, so you  should zap sea POKéMON.
Route12_Text_HankIntro: The FISHING FOOL versus POKéMON  KID!
Route12_Text_HankPostBattle: I guess you get to be good at  what you like.
Well, you beat me at POKéMON,  but you can't top me at fishing.
Route12_Text_ElliotIntro: I love fishing, don't get me wrong.
But it'd be best if I also had more  work.
Route12_Text_ElliotPostBattle: It's all right.  Losing doesn't bug me anymore.
Route12_Text_AndrewIntro: You never know what you could  catch!
Route12_Text_AndrewPostBattle: I catch them all the time, sure.  But, boy are they wimpy.
Route12_Text_JesIntro: JES: If I win, I'm going to  propose to GIA.
Route12_Text_JesDefeat: JES: Oh, please, why couldn't you  let us win?
Route12_Text_JesPostBattle: JES: Oh, GIA, forgive me,  my love!
Route12_Text_JesNotEnoughMons: JES: GIA and I, we'll be  together forever.
We won't battle unless you have  two POKéMON of your own.
Route12_Text_GiaIntro: If we win, I'll marry you!
Route12_Text_GiaPostBattle: GIA: JES, you silly!  You ruined this!
Route12_Text_GiaNotEnoughMons: GIA: I can't bear to battle  without my JES!
Don't you have one more POKéMON?

Route12_FishingHouse_EventScript_Fishing: I'm the FISHING GURU's younger  brother.
I simply looove fishing!  I can't bear to go without.
Tell me, do you like to fish?
Route12_FishingHouse_EventScript_GiveSup: Grand! I like your style.  I think we can be friends.
Take this and fish, young friend!
Fishing is a way of life!  It is like the finest poetry.
From the seas to rivers, go out  and land the big one, my friend.
If you catch a big MAGIKARP   with that ROD, I want to see it.
As much as I love to fish, I also  love seeing gigantic MAGIKARP.

Allow me to see it, quick!

Try fishing with the SUPER ROD in  any body of water.
You'll find different POKéMON in  different places.
Oh, and don't forget to bring me  gigantic MAGIKARP.

I'll look forward to seeing greater  records from you!

Route13_Text_SebastianIntro: My bird POKéMON want to battle  with you!
Route13_Text_SebastianDefeat: My PIDGEY and PIDGEOTTO combo  lost?
Route13_Text_SebastianPostBattle: My POKéMON look happy even though  they lost.
Route13_Text_SusieIntro: I'm told I'm good for a kid.
Route13_Text_SusiePostBattle: I want to become a good TRAINER.  I'll train hard, just watch.
