Route13_Text_ValeriePostBattle: You got those BADGES from GYM  LEADERS. I know!
Route13_Text_GwenIntro: My cute POKéMON wish to make your  acquaintance.
Route13_Text_GwenPostBattle: You have to make POKéMON battle  to toughen them up.
Route13_Text_AlmaIntro: I found CARBOS in a cave once  while I was spelunking.
Route13_Text_AlmaDefeat: Oh, too bad!  I just messed up!
Route13_Text_AlmaPostBattle: CARBOS boosted the SPEED of my  POKéMON.
Route13_Text_PerryIntro: I'm not going to lose.  Not when the wind's blowing my way!
Route13_Text_PerryPostBattle: I'm beat.  I guess I'll FLY home.
Route13_Text_LolaIntro: Sure, I'll play with you, sweetie.
Route13_Text_LolaPostBattle: I wonder which is stronger, male or  female POKéMON?
Route13_Text_SheilaIntro: Do you want to battle some  POKéMON with me?
Route13_Text_SheilaPostBattle: I don't know anything about  POKéMON actually.
The ones I use… I picked them  for their looks!
Route13_Text_RobertIntro: I always go with bird POKéMON.  I've dedicated myself to them.
Route13_Text_RobertPostBattle: I wish I could fly like PIDGEY and  PIDGEOTTO…
Route13_Text_LookToLeftOfThatPost: Look, look!  Look to the left of that post!
Route13_Text_SelectToSwitchItems: Use SELECT to switch items in the  ITEMS window.

Route14_Text_CarterIntro: You need to use TMs to teach good  moves to POKéMON.
Route14_Text_CarterPostBattle: You have some HMs, right? POKéMON  can't forget those moves easily.
Route14_Text_MitchIntro: My bird POKéMON should be ready  for battle.
Route14_Text_MitchPostBattle: My bird POKéMON need to learn  better moves.
Route14_Text_BeckIntro: They have TMs on sale at the  CELADON DEPT. STORE.
TMs aren't really rare, but not  many people have HMs.
Route14_Text_BeckPostBattle: Try teaching POKéMON a move that's  the same type as it.
That apparently boosts the power  of the move.
Route14_Text_MarlonIntro: Have you taught your bird POKéMON  how to FLY?
You'll be able to soar with it into  the sky!
Route14_Text_MarlonPostBattle: Bird POKéMON are my one true love.  I don't want to raise anything else.
Route14_Text_DonaldIntro: Have you heard the legend of the  winged mirages?
Route14_Text_DonaldPostBattle: Well, the winged mirages are the  legendary bird POKéMON.
There are three of them: ARTICUNO,  ZAPDOS, and MOLTRES.
Route14_Text_BennyIntro: I'm not into it, but okay.  Let's go!
Route14_Text_BennyPostBattle: Winning, losing… It's insignificant  under this huge sky.
Route14_Text_LukasIntro: C'mon, c'mon.  Let's go, let's go, let's go!
Route14_Text_LukasPostBattle: What, what, what?  What do you want still?
Route14_Text_IsaacIntro: I need to burn some time.  Shut up and battle.
Route14_Text_IsaacPostBattle: Raising POKéMON is a drag, man.
Route14_Text_GeraldIntro: We ride out here because of the  wide-open spaces.
Route14_Text_GeraldPostBattle: It's cool you made your POKéMON so  strong.
Might is right!  And you know it!
Route14_Text_MalikPostBattle: You know who'd win, you and me  one-on-one!
Route14_Text_KiriIntro: KIRI: JAN, let's try really,  really hard together.
Route14_Text_KiriDefeat: KIRI: Whimper…  We lost, didn't we?
Route14_Text_KiriPostBattle: KIRI: Did we lose because of me?
Route14_Text_KiriNotEnoughMons: KIRI: We can battle if you have  two POKéMON.
Route14_Text_JanIntro: JAN: KIRI, here we go!  We have to try hard!
Route14_Text_JanPostBattle: JAN: KIRI, don't cry!  We'll just try harder next time.
Route14_Text_JanNotEnoughMons: JAN: You want to battle?  You don't have enough POKéMON.

Route15_Text_KindraIntro: I just got some POKéMON in trades.  Can I try them out on you?
Route15_Text_KindraPostBattle: You can't change the nickname of  any POKéMON you get in a trade.
Only the Original TRAINER can get  the nickname changed.
Route15_Text_BeckyIntro: You look gentle, so I think I can  beat you.
Route15_Text_BeckyPostBattle: I'm afraid of BIKERS. They look so  ugly and mean!
Route15_Text_EdwinIntro: When I whistle, I can summon bird  POKéMON.
Route15_Text_EdwinPostBattle: Maybe I'm not cut out for battles.  I'm not the right type, I guess.
Route15_Text_ChesterIntro: Hmm? My birds are shivering!  You're good, aren't you?
Route15_Text_ChesterPostBattle: This is so obvious, you should know  this, but…
Moves like EARTHQUAKE and FISSURE  have no effect on bird POKéMON.
Route15_Text_GraceIntro: Oh, you're a little cutie!  So like a darling POKéMON!
Route15_Text_GracePostBattle: I forgive you.  I can take it.  I'm a big girl now.
Route15_Text_OliviaIntro: I raise POKéMON for protection  because I live alone.
Route15_Text_OliviaDefeat: POKéMON isn't about winning or  losing for me.
Route15_Text_OliviaPostBattle: I love having my POKéMON greet me  when I get home.
Route15_Text_ErnestIntro: Hey, kid! C'mon!  I just got these off some loser!
Route15_Text_ErnestPostBattle: Life's too short.  It's cool to live as an outlaw.  TEAM ROCKET RULES!
Route15_Text_AlexIntro: Fork over all your cash when you  lose to me, kid!
Route15_Text_AlexPostBattle: I was just joking about the money.  Don't take me all serious.
Route15_Text_CeliaIntro: What's cool and happening?  Trading POKéMON!
Route15_Text_CeliaPostBattle: I trade POKéMON with my friends  all the time.
Route15_Text_YazminIntro: Want to play with my POKéMON?
Route15_Text_YazminPostBattle: I'll go train with weaker people.
Route15_Text_MyaIntro: MYA: You're perfect.  Help me train my little brother?
Route15_Text_MyaDefeat: MYA: RON, you have to focus!  Concentrate on what you're doing!
Route15_Text_MyaPostBattle: MYA: Okay, we'll turn it up.  I'll add to our training menu!
Route15_Text_MyaNotEnoughMons: MYA: Do you want to challenge us?  You'll need two POKéMON, though.
Route15_Text_RonIntro: RON: My sister gets scary when we  lose.
Route15_Text_RonDefeat: RON: Oh, no, no…  Sis, I'm sorry!
Route15_Text_RonPostBattle: RON: Oh, bleah…  I wish I had a nice sister…
Route15_Text_RonNotEnoughMons: RON: Did you want to battle with  my sister and me?

Route15_WestEntrance_1F_EventScript_Guar: Are you the kid who's working on  a POKéDEX?
PROF. OAK's AIDE came by here.
Route15_WestEntrance_1F_Text_OaksAideCam: Are you the kid who's working on  a POKéDEX?
PROF. OAK's AIDE came by here.

Route15_WestEntrance_2F_EventScript_Left: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
A large, shining bird is flying  toward the sea.
Route15_WestEntrance_2F_EventScript_Righ: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
It looks like a small island on  the horizon!
Route15_WestEntrance_2F_EventScript_Aide: Hi! Remember me?  I'm one of PROF. OAK's AIDES.
If your POKéDEX has complete data  on  species, I'm supposed to  give you a reward.
PROF. OAK entrusted me with the   for you.
Have you gathered data on at least   kinds of POKéMON?
Great! You have caught or owned   kinds of POKéMON!
EXP. SHARE is an item to be held  by a POKéMON.
The POKéMON will receive a share  of the EXP. Points without having  to battle.
Route15_WestEntrance_2F_EventScript_Alre: EXP. SHARE is an item to be held  by a POKéMON.
The POKéMON will receive a share  of the EXP. Points without having  to battle.
Route15_WestEntrance_2F_Text_GiveItemIfC: Hi! Remember me?  I'm one of PROF. OAK's AIDES.
If your POKéDEX has complete data  on  species, I'm supposed to  give you a reward.
PROF. OAK entrusted me with the   for you.
Have you gathered data on at least   kinds of POKéMON?
Route15_WestEntrance_2F_Text_GreatHereYo: Great! You have caught or owned   kinds of POKéMON!
Route15_WestEntrance_2F_Text_ExplainExpS: EXP. SHARE is an item to be held  by a POKéMON.
The POKéMON will receive a share  of the EXP. Points without having  to battle.
Route15_WestEntrance_2F_Text_LargeShinin: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
A large, shining bird is flying  toward the sea.
Route15_WestEntrance_2F_Text_SmallIsland: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
It looks like a small island on  the horizon!

Route16_EventScript_SnorlaxNoPokeFlute: A POKéMON is sprawled out in  a deep and comfortable slumber.
Route16_Text_LaoPostBattle: We like just hanging here.  What's it to you?
Route16_Text_KojiPostBattle: Forget it, who needs your BIKE!
Route16_Text_LukeIntro: Come out and play, little mouse!
Route16_Text_LukePostBattle: I hate losing!  Get out of my face!
Route16_Text_HideoPostBattle: We'll always be hanging around here  even if you don't like it.
You can detour to VERMILION from  FUCHSIA going along the coast.
Route16_Text_CamronIntro: I'm feeling hungry and mean!  I need a punching bag!
Route16_Text_CamronPostBattle: If I'm going to have POKéMON, they  may as well be ferocious.
I'd use them to leave my enemies  in tatters.
Route16_Text_RubenIntro: Hey, there!  Let's have ourselves a good time!
Route16_Text_RubenPostBattle: I get my kicks by harassing people  with my stinking POKéMON.
They're great for startling people.  And, they bite, too.
Route16_Text_MonSprawledOutInSlumber: A POKéMON is sprawled out in  a deep and comfortable slumber.
Route16_Text_JedIntro: JED: Our love knows no bounds.  We're in love and we show it!
Route16_Text_JedDefeat: JED: Oh, no!  My love has seen me as a loser!
Route16_Text_JedPostBattle: JED: Listen, LEA.  You need to focus less on me.
Route16_Text_JedNotEnoughMons: JED: You have just one POKéMON?  Is there no love in your heart?
Route16_Text_LeaIntro: LEA: Sometimes, the intensity of  our love scares me.
Route16_Text_LeaDefeat: LEA: Ohh! But JED looks cool  even in a loss!
Route16_Text_LeaPostBattle: LEA: Ehehe, I'm sorry.  JED is so cool.
Route16_Text_LeaNotEnoughMons: LEA: Oh, you don't have two  POKéMON with you?
Doesn't it feel lonely for you or  your POKéMON?

Route16_House_EventScript_Woman: Oh, dear.  You've found my secret retreat.
Please don't tell anyone I'm here.  I'll make it up to you with this!
HM02 is FLY.  It's a wonderfully convenient move.
Please, put it to good use.
Route16_House_EventScript_NoRoomForHM02: You don't have any room for this.
Route16_House_EventScript_AlreadyGotHM02: HM02 is FLY.  It's a wonderfully convenient move.
Please, put it to good use.
Route16_House_Text_FoundMySecretRetreat: Oh, dear.  You've found my secret retreat.
Please don't tell anyone I'm here.  I'll make it up to you with this!
Route16_House_Text_ExplainHM02: HM02 is FLY.  It's a wonderfully convenient move.
Please, put it to good use.
Route16_House_Text_DontHaveAnyRoomForThi: You don't have any room for this.

Route16_NorthEntrance_1F_EventScript_Gua: CYCLING ROAD is a downhill course  by the sea. It's a great ride.
Route16_NorthEntrance_1F_EventScript_Nee: No pedestrians are allowed on  CYCLING ROAD!
Route16_NorthEntrance_1F_EventScript_Old: How'd you get in?  Good effort!
Route16_NorthEntrance_1F_Text_NoPedestri: No pedestrians are allowed on  CYCLING ROAD!
Route16_NorthEntrance_1F_Text_CyclingRoa: CYCLING ROAD is a downhill course  by the sea. It's a great ride.
Route16_NorthEntrance_1F_Text_HowdYouGet: How'd you get in?  Good effort!

Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_EventScript_Lit: I'm on a relaxing ride on my new  bike with my girlfriend.
We're going riding together on our  new bikes.
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_EventScript_Lef: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_EventScript_Rig: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
There's a long path over water far  away.
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_EventScript_Aid: Hi! Remember me?  I'm one of PROF. OAK's AIDES.
If your POKéDEX has complete data  on 40 species, I'm supposed to  give you a reward.
PROF. OAK entrusted me with an  AMULET COIN for you.
Have you gathered data on at least  40 kinds of POKéMON?
Great! You have caught or owned   kinds of POKéMON!
An AMULET COIN is an item to be  held by a POKéMON.
If the POKéMON appears in a winning  battle, you will earn more money.
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_EventScript_Alr: An AMULET COIN is an item to be  held by a POKéMON.
If the POKéMON appears in a winning  battle, you will earn more money.
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_Text_OnBikeRide: I'm on a relaxing ride on my new  bike with my girlfriend.
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_Text_RidingToge: We're going riding together on our  new bikes.
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_Text_ItsCeladon: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_Text_LongPathOv: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
There's a long path over water far  away.
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_Text_GiveAmulet: Hi! Remember me?  I'm one of PROF. OAK's AIDES.
If your POKéDEX has complete data  on 40 species, I'm supposed to  give you a reward.
PROF. OAK entrusted me with an  AMULET COIN for you.
Have you gathered data on at least  40 kinds of POKéMON?
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_Text_GreatHereY: Great! You have caught or owned   kinds of POKéMON!
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_Text_ReceivedAm: [Player] received the AMULET COIN  from the AIDE.
Route16_NorthEntrance_2F_Text_ExplainAmu: An AMULET COIN is an item to be  held by a POKéMON.
If the POKéMON appears in a winning  battle, you will earn more money.

Route17_EventScript_TrainerTips1: Even POKéMON of the same species  and level grow at different rates.
Route17_EventScript_TrainerTips2: Press the B Button to stay in place  while on a slope.
Route17_EventScript_BallsNotice: Don't throw the game, throw POKé  BALLS instead!
Route17_Text_RaulIntro: There's no getting rich quick in  battling kids.
Route17_Text_RaulPostBattle: You can find good stuff lying  around on CYCLING ROAD.
There's good money in picking them  up and selling them.
Route17_Text_IsaiahIntro: I'm mighty proud of my bod, kiddo.  Come on!
Route17_Text_IsaiahPostBattle: I could belly-bump you outta  here!
Route17_Text_BillyIntro: We're BIKERS!  We rule the roads, man!
Route17_Text_NikolasPostBattle: I got my VOLTORB at the abandoned  POWER PLANT.
Route17_Text_ZeekIntro: I leveled up my POKéMON, but it  won't evolve. Why?
Route17_Text_ZeekPostBattle: Maybe some POKéMON need element  STONES to evolve.
Route17_Text_JamalPostBattle: I'm sure I lost weight there!
Route17_Text_CoreyPostBattle: Be ready to fight for your beliefs!
Route17_Text_JaxonPostBattle: The slope makes it hard to steer.
Route17_Text_WilliamPostBattle: I need to catch a few z's!
Route17_Text_SameSpeciesGrowDifferentRat: Even POKéMON of the same species  and level grow at different rates.
Route17_Text_PressBToStayInPlace: Press the B Button to stay in place  while on a slope.
Route17_Text_DontThrowGameThrowBalls: Don't throw the game, throw POKé  BALLS instead!

Route18_Text_WiltonIntro: I always check every grassy area  for new POKéMON.
Route18_Text_WiltonPostBattle: I wish I had a BIKE!
Route18_Text_RamiroIntro: Kurukkoo!  How do you like my birdcall?
Route18_Text_RamiroPostBattle: I collect sea POKéMON on weekends  because the sea is so close.
Route18_Text_JacobIntro: This is my turf!  Get out of here!
Route18_Text_JacobPostBattle: This is my fave area for catching  POKéMON.

Route18_EastEntrance_1F_EventScript_Guar: CYCLING ROAD is all uphill from  here.
Route18_EastEntrance_1F_EventScript_Need: You need a BICYCLE to go out on  CYCLING ROAD!
Route18_EastEntrance_1F_Text_NeedBicycle: You need a BICYCLE to go out on  CYCLING ROAD!
Route18_EastEntrance_1F_Text_CyclingRoad: CYCLING ROAD is all uphill from  here.

Route18_EastEntrance_2F_EventScript_Left: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
PALLET TOWN is in the west.
Route18_EastEntrance_2F_EventScript_Righ: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
Route18_EastEntrance_2F_Text_PalletTownI: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…
PALLET TOWN is in the west.
Route18_EastEntrance_2F_Text_PeopleSwimm: Let's see what the binoculars have  to show…

Route19_EventScript_RouteSign: SEA ROUTE 19  FUCHSIA CITY - SEAFOAM ISLANDS
Route19_Text_RichardIntro: I have to exercise and warm up  before going out for a swim.
Route19_Text_RichardPostBattle: Thanks, kid!  I'm ready for a swim.
Route19_Text_ReeceIntro: Wait! Slow down!  You'll have a heart attack!
Route19_Text_ReecePostBattle: Watch out for TENTACOOL.  They sting so painfully.
Route19_Text_MatthewIntro: I love swimming!  What about you?
Route19_Text_MatthewPostBattle: I can beat even marine POKéMON  at swimming.
Route19_Text_DouglasPostBattle: I see a couple of islands over  yonder!
Route19_Text_DavidIntro: I tried diving for POKéMON, but it  was a no-go.
Route19_Text_DavidPostBattle: I guess you have to fish for sea  POKéMON.
Route19_Text_TonyIntro: I look at the sea to forget all  the bad things that happened.
Route19_Text_TonyPostBattle: I'm looking at the sea to forget  the bad thing that happened!
Route19_Text_AnyaIntro: Oh, I just love your ride!  Can I have it if I win?
Route19_Text_AnyaPostBattle: It's still a long way to go to  SEAFOAM ISLANDS…
I want to go back to FUCHSIA…
Route19_Text_AlicePostBattle: My boyfriend wanted to swim to  SEAFOAM ISLANDS.
Route19_Text_AxleIntro: Ahoy, there!  These waters are treacherous!
Route19_Text_AxlePostBattle: M-my legs! They cramped up!  Glub, glub…
Route19_Text_ConnieIntro: I swam here with my friends…  I'm tired…
Route19_Text_ConniePostBattle: If I were to ride a POKéMON on  the sea, I'd like a LAPRAS.
LAPRAS is so big, I bet it  would keep me dry on water.
Route19_Text_RouteSign: SEA ROUTE 19  FUCHSIA CITY - SEAFOAM ISLANDS
Route19_Text_LiaIntro: LIA: I'm looking after my brother.  He just became a TRAINER.
Route19_Text_LiaDefeat: LIA: That's no way to treat my  little brother!
Route19_Text_LiaPostBattle: LIA: Do you have a younger  brother?
I hope you're teaching him all  sorts of things.
Route19_Text_LiaNotEnoughMons: LIA: I want to battle together  with my little brother.
Route19_Text_LucIntro: LUC: My big sis taught me how  to swim and train POKéMON.
Route19_Text_LucDefeat: LUC: Oh, wow!  Someone tougher than my big sis!
Route19_Text_LucPostBattle: LUC: My big sis is strong and nice.  I think she's awesome!
Route19_Text_LucNotEnoughMons: LUC: I don't want to if I can't  battle you with my big sis.

Route20_Text_BarryIntro: The water is shallow here.  There are many people swimming.
Route20_Text_BarryPostBattle: I wish I could ride my POKéMON.  I bet you're not tired.
Route20_Text_ShirleyIntro: SEAFOAM is a quiet getaway.  I'm vacationing here.
Route20_Text_ShirleyPostBattle: There's a huge cavern underneath  this island.
Route20_Text_TiffanyIntro: I love floating with the fishes  here among the waves.
Route20_Text_IrenePostBattle: SEAFOAM used to be a single island  in the distant past.
Route20_Text_DeanPostBattle: I should've been buffing up my  POKéMON, not me!
Route20_Text_DarrinIntro: Why are you riding a POKéMON?  Can't you swim?
Route20_Text_DarrinPostBattle: Riding a POKéMON sure looks fun!
Route20_Text_RogerIntro: I rode my bird POKéMON here.
Route20_Text_RogerDefeat: Oh, no!  Now what am I to do?
Route20_Text_RogerPostBattle: My birds are exhausted.  They can't FLY me back!
Route20_Text_NoraIntro: My boyfriend gave me big pearls.
Route20_Text_NoraDefeat: Oh, no!  My pearls were in them!
Route20_Text_NoraPostBattle: Will my pearls grow bigger inside  CLOYSTER?
Route20_Text_MissyIntro: I swam here from CINNABAR ISLAND.  It wasn't easy, I tell you.
Route20_Text_MissyPostBattle: POKéMON have taken over an  abandoned mansion on CINNABAR.
They call it the POKéMON MANSION  now.
Route20_Text_MelissaIntro: CINNABAR, in the west, has a LAB  for POKéMON.
Route20_Text_MelissaPostBattle: I heard it rose out of the sea  when a volcano erupted.
Route20_Text_MistyTrainsHere: Strong TRAINERS and WATER POKéMON  are common sights in these parts.
They say that MISTY of the  CERULEAN GYM trains here.

Route21_North_Text_RonaldIntro: You want to know if the fish are  biting?
Route21_North_Text_RonaldPostBattle: I can't catch anything good.  Not one good POKéMON to be had!
Route21_North_Text_WadeIntro: I got a big haul!  Wanna go for it?
Route21_North_Text_WadeDefeat: Heheh, MAGIKARP just don't make  the grade, do they?
Route21_North_Text_WadePostBattle: I seem to only catch MAGIKARP!
Route21_North_Text_SpencerIntro: The sea cleanses my body and soul!
Route21_North_Text_SpencerPostBattle: The sea is great and all, but I  like the mountains, too.
Route21_North_Text_CueBallIntro: おれだって　たまには  およぎに　くるぜ！
Route21_North_Text_CueBallPostBattle: うきやすそう　だと？  うるせー　おおきな　おせわだッ！

Route21_South_Text_JackIntro: I caught my POKéMON at sea.
Route21_South_Text_JeromeIntro: Right now, I'm in a triathlon meet.
Route21_South_Text_JeromePostBattle: I'm beat! But, I still have the  bike race and marathon left!
Route21_South_Text_RolandIntro: Ahh!  Feel the sun and the wind!
Route21_South_Text_ClaudeIntro: Hey, don't scare away the fish!
Route21_South_Text_ClaudeDefeat: Sorry! I'm just so frustrated from  not catching anything.
Route21_South_Text_ClaudePostBattle: Sheesh, I haven't caught a thing.  Could this place actually be a  giant pool or something?
Route21_South_Text_NolanIntro: Keep me company till I get a hit.
Route21_South_Text_NolanPostBattle: Oh wait!  I got a bite! Yeah!
Route21_North_Text_LilIntro: LIL: Huh? A battle?  IAN, can't you do it alone?
Route21_North_Text_LilDefeat: LIL: Oh, see?  We lost. Happy now?
Route21_North_Text_LilPostBattle: LIL: I'm tired.  Can't we go home already?
Route21_North_Text_LilNotEnoughMons: LIL: Huh? A battle?  I can't be bothered to do it alone.  Bring two POKéMON, won't you?
Route21_North_Text_IanIntro: IAN: My sis doesn't get enough  exercise, so I made her come.
Route21_North_Text_IanDefeat: IAN: Awww, Sis!  Get it together!
Route21_North_Text_IanPostBattle: You're not going to lose weight  like this!
Route21_North_Text_IanNotEnoughMons: IAN: We want a two-on-two battle.  So can you bring two POKéMON?

Route22_EventScript_EarlyRival: You're off to the POKéMON LEAGUE?  Forget about it!
You probably don't have any  BADGES, do you?
The guard won't let you through  without them.
By the way, did your POKéMON get  any stronger?
I heard the POKéMON LEAGUE is  crawling with tough TRAINERS.
I have to figure out how to get  past them.
You should quit dawdling and get a  move on!
Route22_EventScript_LateRival: [Rival]: What? [Player]!  What a surprise to see you here!
So you're going to the POKéMON  LEAGUE?
You collected all the BADGES, too?  That's cool!
Then I'll whip you, [Player], as a  warm-up for the POKéMON LEAGUE!
That loosened me up.  I'm ready for the POKéMON LEAGUE!
But hey, you know that!  I'm out of here. Smell ya!
Route22_Text_EarlyRivalIntro: You're off to the POKéMON LEAGUE?  Forget about it!
You probably don't have any  BADGES, do you?
The guard won't let you through  without them.
By the way, did your POKéMON get  any stronger?
Route22_Text_EarlyRivalPostBattle: I heard the POKéMON LEAGUE is  crawling with tough TRAINERS.
I have to figure out how to get  past them.
You should quit dawdling and get a  move on!
Route22_Text_RivalShouldCatchSomeMons: [Rival]“なんだ？  ポケモン　2ひきも  もってるの　なぜか　だって？
おまえも  つかまえれば　いい　じゃん！
Route22_Text_LateRivalIntro: [Rival]: What? [Player]!  What a surprise to see you here!
So you're going to the POKéMON  LEAGUE?
You collected all the BADGES, too?  That's cool!
Then I'll whip you, [Player], as a  warm-up for the POKéMON LEAGUE!
Route22_Text_LateRivalPostBattle: That loosened me up.  I'm ready for the POKéMON LEAGUE!
But hey, you know that!  I'm out of here. Smell ya!
Route22_Text_LateRivalVictory: [Rival]“ひゃははッ　[Player]ー！  それで　がんばってるのかよ！  おれの　さいのうに　くらべりゃ  [Player]は　まだまだ　だな！
もっと　れんしゅう　こいよ！  あははーッ！

Route24_EventScript_Rocket: Congratulations! You beat our  five contest TRAINERS!
You just earned a fabulous prize!
Route24_EventScript_RocketPostBattle: With your ability, you'd become  a top leader in TEAM ROCKET.
Come on, think of the opportunity!  Don't let this chance go to waste.
Route24_EventScript_RocketTrigger: Congratulations! You beat our  five contest TRAINERS!
You just earned a fabulous prize!
Route24_EventScript_BattleRocket: With your ability, you'd become  a top leader in TEAM ROCKET.
Come on, think of the opportunity!  Don't let this chance go to waste.
Route24_Text_JustEarnedFabulousPrize: Congratulations! You beat our  five contest TRAINERS!
You just earned a fabulous prize!
Route24_Text_ReceivedNuggetFromMysteryTr: [Player] received a NUGGET  from the mystery TRAINER!
Route24_Text_JoinTeamRocket: By the way, how would you like to  join TEAM ROCKET?
We're a group of professional  criminals specializing in POKéMON!
I'll make you an offer you can't  refuse!
Route24_Text_YoudBecomeTopRocketLeader: With your ability, you'd become  a top leader in TEAM ROCKET.
Come on, think of the opportunity!  Don't let this chance go to waste.
Route24_Text_ShaneIntro: I saw your feat from the grass!
Route24_Text_ShanePostBattle: I hid because the people on the  bridge frightened me.
Route24_Text_EthanIntro: Okay! I'm No. 5!  I'll stomp you!
Route24_Text_EthanPostBattle: I did my best. I have no regrets!
Route24_Text_ReliPostBattle: I did my best, so I've no regrets!
Route24_Text_TimmyIntro: Here's No. 3!  I won't be easy!
Route24_Text_TimmyPostBattle: I did my best. I have no regrets!
Route24_Text_AliPostBattle: I did my best. I have no regrets!
Route24_Text_CaleIntro: People call this the NUGGET  BRIDGE!
Beat us five TRAINERS and win  a fabulous prize!
Think you got what it takes?
Route24_Text_CalePostBattle: I did my best. I have no regrets!

Route25_EventScript_Man: If you're out at CERULEAN's cape…  Well, it should be as a couple.
Route25_Text_JoeyIntro: Local TRAINERS come here to  practice.
Route25_Text_JoeyPostBattle: All POKéMON have weaknesses.  Even the strongest ones.
That's why it's best to raise  POKéMON of different types.
Route25_Text_DanIntro: Dad took me to a great party on  the S.S. ANNE at VERMILION CITY.
Route25_Text_DanPostBattle: On the S.S. ANNE, I saw TRAINERS  from around the world.
Route25_Text_FlintIntro: I'm a cool guy.  I've got a girlfriend!
Route25_Text_FlintPostBattle: Oh, well.  My girlfriend will cheer me up.
Route25_Text_KelseyPostBattle: I wish my boyfriend was as good  as you.
Route25_Text_ChadIntro: I had this feeling…  I knew I had to battle you!
Route25_Text_ChadPostBattle: If your POKéMON gets confused,  switch it out.
Route25_Text_HaleyIntro: My friend has many cute POKéMON.  I'm so jealous!
Route25_Text_HaleyPostBattle: You came from MT. MOON?  May I have a CLEFAIRY?
Route25_Text_FranklinIntro: I just got down from MT. MOON,  but I've still got gas in the tank!
Route25_Text_FranklinPostBattle: Drat!  A ZUBAT bit me back in that cave.
Route25_Text_NobIntro: I'm off to see a POKéMANIAC's  collection at the cape.
Route25_Text_NobDefeat: You done got me, and real good,  too!
Route25_Text_NobPostBattle: The POKéMANIAC sure lives up to  his name.
His collection includes many rare  species of POKéMON.
Route25_Text_WayneIntro: You're going to see BILL?  First, we battle!
Route25_Text_WaynePostBattle: The trail below is a shortcut to  CERULEAN CITY.
Route25_Text_MistyHighHopesAboutThisPlac: This cape is a famous date spot.
MISTY, the GYM LEADER, has high  hopes about this place.
Route25_Text_AreYouHereAlone: If you're out at CERULEAN's cape…  Well, it should be as a couple.

Route25_SeaCottage_EventScript_BillAskFo: Hiya! I'm a POKéMON…  …No I'm not!
Call me BILL!  I'm a true-blue POKéMANIAC!
Hey!  What's with that skeptical look?
I screwed up an experiment and got  combined with a POKéMON!
So, how about it?  Help me out here!

I hear there are lots of TRAINERS  on board, too.
They invited me to their party, but  I can't stand fancy do's.
Why don't you go instead of me?  Go on and have a good time.

So, did you come to see my  POKéMON collection?
I've got to thank you…  Oh, here, maybe this'll do.

Route2_EastBuilding_EventScript_Aide: Hi! Remember me?  I'm one of PROF. OAK's AIDES.
If your POKéDEX has complete data  on ten species, I'm supposed to  give you a reward.
PROF. OAK entrusted me with  HM05 for you.
Have you gathered data on at least  ten kinds of POKéMON?
Great! You have caught or owned   kinds of POKéMON!
HM05 contains the hidden move  FLASH.
FLASH lights up even the darkest  of caves and dungeons.
Route2_EastBuilding_EventScript_AlreadyG: HM05 contains the hidden move  FLASH.
FLASH lights up even the darkest  of caves and dungeons.
Route2_EastBuilding_EventScript_Rocker: Once a POKéMON learns FLASH, you  can get through ROCK TUNNEL.

Route2_House_EventScript_Scientist: A fainted POKéMON just has no  energy left to battle.
It can still use moves like CUT  outside of battle.
Route2_House_Text_FaintedMonsCanUseField: A fainted POKéMON just has no  energy left to battle.
It can still use moves like CUT  outside of battle.

Route2_ViridianForest_NorthEntrance_Even: Many POKéMON live only in forests   and caves.
You need to be persistent and look  everywhere to get different kinds.
Have you noticed the skinny trees  on the roadside?
They can be cut down by a special  POKéMON move, I hear.
Do you know the evolution-cancel  technique?
When a POKéMON is evolving, you  can stop the process.
It's a technique for raising  POKéMON the way they are.

Route2_ViridianForest_SouthEntrance_Even: Are you going to VIRIDIAN FOREST?  It's a natural maze in there.  Be careful you don't get lost.
RATTATA may be small, but don't  underestimate its wicked bite.
Route2_ViridianForest_SouthEntrance_Text: Are you going to VIRIDIAN FOREST?  It's a natural maze in there.  Be careful you don't get lost.
RATTATA may be small, but don't  underestimate its wicked bite.

Route3_EventScript_Youngster: Whew… I better take a rest…  Groan…
That tunnel from CERULEAN takes a  lot out of you!
Route3_Text_TunnelFromCeruleanTiring: Whew… I better take a rest…  Groan…
That tunnel from CERULEAN takes a  lot out of you!
Route3_Text_ColtonIntro: Hey!  I saw you in VIRIDIAN FOREST!
Route3_Text_ColtonPostBattle: There are other kinds of POKéMON  than the ones you find in forests.
Route3_Text_BenIntro: They're delightfully comfy and  easy to wear!
Route3_Text_BenPostBattle: Are you using a POKéMON CENTER's  PC for storing your POKéMON?
Each BOX can hold up to  30 POKéMON.
Route3_Text_JaniceIntro: Excuse me!  You looked at me, didn't you?
Route3_Text_JanicePostBattle: You shouldn't be staring if you  don't want to battle!
Route3_Text_GregIntro: Are you a TRAINER?  Let's get with it right away!
Route3_Text_GregDefeat: If I had new POKéMON, I would've  won!
Route3_Text_GregPostBattle: If a POKéMON BOX on the PC gets  full, just switch to another BOX.
Route3_Text_SallyIntro: That look you gave me…  It's so intriguing!
Route3_Text_SallyPostBattle: You can avoid battles by not  letting TRAINERS see you.
Route3_Text_CalvinIntro: Hey! You're not wearing shorts!  What's wrong with you?
Route3_Text_CalvinPostBattle: I always wear shorts, even in  winter. That's my policy.
Route3_Text_JamesIntro: I'll battle you with the POKéMON  I just caught.
Route3_Text_JamesPostBattle: Trained POKéMON are stronger than  the wild ones.
Route3_Text_RobinPostBattle: ROUTE 4 is at the foot of  MT. MOON.

Route4_EventScript_Woman: Ouch! I tripped over a rocky  POKéMON, GEODUDE!
Route4_Text_TrippedOverGeodude: Ouch! I tripped over a rocky  POKéMON, GEODUDE!
Route4_Text_CrissyIntro: I came to MT. MOON in search of  mushroom POKéMON.
Route4_Text_CrissyDefeat: After all I did to catch them!
Route4_Text_CrissyPostBattle: There might not be any more  mushrooms here.
I think I got them all.
Text_MegaPunchTeach: When the chips are down,  MEGA PUNCH is the ultimate attack!  You agree, yes?
Now!  Let me teach it to your POKéMON!
Text_MegaPunchDeclined: You'll be back when you understand  the worth of MEGA PUNCH.
Text_MegaPunchWhichMon: Fine!  Which POKéMON will learn it?
Text_MegaPunchTaught: Now, we are comrades in the way of  punching!
You should go before you're seen  by the misguided fool who trains  only his silly kicking over there.
Text_MegaKickTeach: When you get right down to it,  MEGA KICK is the ultimate attack!  Don't you agree?
Okay!  I'll teach it to your POKéMON!
Text_MegaKickDeclined: You'll come crawling back when you  realize the value of MEGA KICK.
Text_MegaKickWhichMon: All right!  Which POKéMON wants to learn it?
Text_MegaKickTaught: Now, we are soul mates in the way  of kicking!
You should run before you're seen  by the deluded nitwit who trains  only simple punching over there.
Route4_Text_PeopleLikeAndRespectBrock: Oh, wow, that's the BOULDERBADGE!  You got it from BROCK, didn't you?
BROCK is cool. He's not just tough.  People like and respect him.
I want to become a GYM LEADER  like him.

Route4_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_Boy: Okay, set six POKé BALLS in my  belt…
Yeah, that'll do it. At most, you  can have six POKéMON with you.
Route4_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_Gent: Not a day goes by without TEAM  ROCKET being in the news.
Route4_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_AskB: MAN: Hello there, laddie!  Have I got a deal just for you!
I'll let you have a secret POKéMON  - a MAGIKARP - for just ¥500!
So, you'll buy it, am I right?
MAN: Hello there, sweetie pie!  Have I got a deal just for you!

So, you'll buy it, am I right?

In that case, you should just  store some using any PC.

Route5_PokemonDayCare_Text_ComeSeeMeInAW: Come see me in a while.
Route5_PokemonDayCare_Text_MonNeedsToSpe: Your  needs to spend  some more time with me.

Oh, wait there, the road's closed.
Route5_SouthEntrance_EventScript_GuardDr: Oh, that TEA…  It looks awfully tasty…
Huh? I can have this drink?  Gee, thanks!  … …  Glug, glug…  … …  Gulp…  If you want to go to SAFFRON  CITY…  … …  You can go on through.
I'll share this TEA with the other  guards!

Route6_Text_NancyIntro: Excuse me!  This is a private conversation!
Route6_Text_KeigoIntro: There aren't many bugs out here.
Route6_Text_KeigoPostBattle: I like bugs, so I'm going back to  VIRIDIAN FOREST.
Route6_Text_JeffIntro: Huh?  You want to talk to me?
Route6_Text_JeffDefeat: This stinks…  I couldn't beat your challenge…
Route6_Text_JeffPostBattle: I should bring more POKéMON with  me. I'll feel safer that way.
Route6_Text_IsabellePostBattle: I want to get stronger.  What's your secret?
Route6_Text_ElijahIntro: I've never seen you around.  Are you good?
Route6_Text_ElijahPostBattle: Are my POKéMON weak?  Or, am I just bad?  Which do you think?

Route8_Text_AidanIntro: You look good at POKéMON, but how  is your chemistry grade?
Route8_Text_AidanPostBattle: I am better at school than this!
Route8_Text_StanIntro: All right!  Let's play a game!
Route8_Text_GlennIntro: You should be informed.  You need strategy to win at this!
Route8_Text_PaigeIntro: I like NIDORAN, so I collect them!
Route8_Text_PaigePostBattle: When POKéMON grow up, they get  ugly! They shouldn't evolve.
Route8_Text_LeslieIntro: School is fun, but so are POKéMON.
Route8_Text_LeslieDefeat: You made it clear to me that  I should stick with school.
Route8_Text_LesliePostBattle: I was planning on getting some  fresh air for a change, but…
We're stuck here because of the  gates at SAFFRON.
Route8_Text_AndreaIntro: MEOWTH is so cute, meow, meow,  meow!
Route8_Text_AndreaPostBattle: I think PIDGEY and RATTATA are  cute, too!
Route8_Text_MeganIntro: We must look silly standing here  like this.
Route8_Text_MeganDefeat: Look what you did to my poor, cute  POKéMON!
Route8_Text_MeganPostBattle: SAFFRON's gatekeeper won't let us  go through.
I know he's doing his job, but I  think he's mean.
Route8_Text_RichPostBattle: Playing games and POKéMON are like  eating peanuts! I just can't stop!

SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_Sabrina: It makes the POKéMON concentrate  to raise both SP. ATK and SP. DEF.
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_GiveTM04: The MARSHBADGE makes POKéMON up  to Lv. 70 obey you.
Stronger POKéMON will become wild,  ignoring your orders in battle.
Just don't raise your POKéMON too  much to avoid that problem.
Wait, please take this TM with you.
Psychic power isn't something that  only a few people have.
Everyone has psychic power.  People just don't realize it.
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_NoRoomForTM0: Your BAG is full of other items.
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_Johan: PSYCHIC POKéMON fear only ghosts  and bugs!
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_Tyron: SABRINA just wiped out the KARATE  MASTER next door.
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_Cameron: There used to be two POKéMON GYMS  in SAFFRON.
The FIGHTING DOJO next door lost  its GYM status, though.
We simply creamed them when we  decided to have just one GYM.
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_Preston: That's right! I used telepathy to  read your mind!
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_Amanda: In a battle of equals, the one  with the stronger will wins.
If you wish to beat SABRINA, focus  and will yourself to victory.
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_Stacy: I have much to learn still…
I must master PSYCHIC and teach it  to my POKéMON…
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_Tasha: I knew that this was going to take  place.
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuy: SABRINA's POKéMON use psychic  power instead of force.
FIGHTING POKéMON are especially  weak against PSYCHIC POKéMON.
They'll get destroyed before they  can even aim a punch!
SaffronCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuyPostVi: If I had that, I'd make a bundle  at the slots!
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_SabrinaIntro: I had a vision of your arrival.
I have had psychic powers since  I was a child.
It started when a spoon I  carelessly tossed, bent.
I dislike battling, but if you wish,  I will show you my powers!
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_SabrinaDefeat: This loss shocks me!  But, a loss is a loss.
I admit, I didn't work hard enough  to win.
Your victory has earned you the  MARSHBADGE.
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_SabrinaPostBattle: Psychic power isn't something that  only a few people have.
Everyone has psychic power.  People just don't realize it.

Stronger POKéMON will become wild,  ignoring your orders in battle.
Just don't raise your POKéMON too  much to avoid that problem.
Wait, please take this TM with you.

SaffronCity_Gym_Text_BagFullOfOtherItems: Your BAG is full of other items.
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_AmandaIntro: SABRINA is far younger than I,  but she has earned my respect.
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_AmandaPostBattle: In a battle of equals, the one  with the stronger will wins.
If you wish to beat SABRINA, focus  and will yourself to victory.
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_JohanIntro: Does our unseen power scare you?
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_JohanPostBattle: PSYCHIC POKéMON fear only ghosts  and bugs!
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_StacyIntro: POKéMON take on the appearance of  their TRAINERS.
Your POKéMON must be tough, then!
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_StacyPostBattle: I have much to learn still…
I must master PSYCHIC and teach it  to my POKéMON…
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_TyronIntro: That power alone isn't enough to  win in the world of POKéMON?
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_TyronPostBattle: SABRINA just wiped out the KARATE  MASTER next door.
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_TashaIntro: You and I, our POKéMON shall  battle!
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_TashaPostBattle: I knew that this was going to take  place.
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_CameronIntro: SABRINA is young, but she's also  our highly skilled LEADER.
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_CameronPostBattle: There used to be two POKéMON GYMS  in SAFFRON.
The FIGHTING DOJO next door lost  its GYM status, though.
We simply creamed them when we  decided to have just one GYM.
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_PrestonIntro: SAFFRON POKéMON GYM is famous for  training psychics.
You want to see SABRINA, don't  you? I can tell!
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_PrestonPostBattle: That's right! I used telepathy to  read your mind!

FIGHTING POKéMON are especially  weak against PSYCHIC POKéMON.
They'll get destroyed before they  can even aim a punch!
SaffronCity_Gym_Text_GymGuyPostVictory: If I had that, I'd make a bundle  at the slots!

SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_EventS: Huh?  You…
Are you maybe…  … …
You are!  You are [Player]!
We were just talking about you!
We were talking about how an  incredibly good TRAINER appeared.
And that someone is you!  You're so cool!
So, we decided that we'll become  your FAN CLUB!
We all hope you'll keep battling  and show us how cool you are.
That way, maybe other people will  become fans just like me.
I'm sorry.  I was your fan before.
But now, you seem to have lost  the drive you had before.
Lately, I think  has been  a lot cooler.
I'll always be cheering for you!
Go, [Player], go!
I'll always believe in you,  [Player].
Please show the others what you're  like when you battle seriously.
Oh!  [Player]!
Everyone's been all excited about  you recently.
I can understand why.  I know that you're strong.
But, do you know what?
Once I became 's fan,  I can't just stop being a fan.
I think TRAINERS are so cool when  they're battling.
Don't you think so, too?
Do you know what?  I want to be like SABRINA!
I want to be a psychic girl just  like her!
It's [Player]!  It's [Player]!
I want to be like [Player] one day!
Everyone stopped being [Player]'s  fan…
But that means I can have [Player]  all to myself!
Yay! Go for it!  My one and only [Player]!
Even if I'm the only one, I won't  stop being SABRINA's fan.
My dream is to be like SABRINA,  cute, but cool.
I want to be a psychic girl just  like her!
I wonder if I can become a cool  TRAINER one day?
BROCK's my hero!  He's a man among men!
Heheh, I got my mom to do  something for me.
I got her to embroider “BROCK”  on my shorts!
Oh! It's [Player]!  Too cool!
Oh!  Oh, yeah!
Can you autograph something?  How about my shorts?
However hot it's been…
And however cold it may get…
I've always believed in, and worn,  shorts!
I'm counting on you to keep  winning!
I believe in you just as much as  I believe in shorts!
…  …  I'm BROCK's fan!
Even if I were his only fan,  I swear it on my rock-hard will,  and on my shorts!
I'll be his fan to the bitter end!
BROCK's the last word on cool,  end of story!
Now there's a guy who I want to  be like!
Hmm…  And you are?
Were you hoping to sign up for  a membership in our FAN CLUB?
[Player], I've had the pleasure of  watching you battle.
It brings back sweet memories of  my own long-lost youth.
May you continue to find success.  You have a fan in me!
I have journeyed far and wide  across the lands.
But never have I seen a TRAINER  of your magnificence.
Take courage in your abilities  and keep battling on!
Make that a promise to me,  my young idol!
Ah, so you are the much-  talked-about [Player].
You certainly do have the look of  a winner.
But for me to accept you as  a true POKéMON great…
You've still a ways to go!
All of us gathered here are fans  of POKéMON TRAINERS.
The way they look in battle…  They are the picture of coolness.
Perhaps you will be talked about  here, too, if you keep winning.
Recently,  has been on  fire.
The way he battles… It's just   the way that I like it!
Oh, my goodness!  Is it really you, [Player]?
I have to tell you, I adore the  way you battle.
I hope you'll keep at it.  I'll be your number one fan!
Oh, my goodness!  If it isn't [Player]!
It's so disappointing… I realized  I'm your number-one-and-only fan!
Well, it can't be helped!  Let me cheer you on, at least!
Hurray, hurray, [Player]!
Oh, hello!  If it isn't [Player]!
Lately, all everyone talks about  is you.
I'm feeling lonesome because I  prefer .
's cool, huh?  I love the way he talks.
I'd really relish a chance to meet  him in person once.
Oh, man, oh, man!  Cool! Too cool!
…Huh?  No, not you.
Just the way you battle.  That's cool.
Yo, [Player]!
Looks like I'm the only one left  out of your fans.
But, you know, I like being an only  fan… It's less stressful.
Keep up and at it!
Huh, can you believe it?  Everyone turned into your fans.
So after all we've been through,  I'm the lone  fan?
Eh, being the one and only   fan's my style, anyway.
Master  is so dignified…  He is so my type.
Why can't the others see the  dignity he simply oozes?
Amazing!  [Player], you really are amazing!
Instead of just watching, maybe  I should become a TRAINER, too.
I'm your only fan…  Sigh… This is lonely…
Can't you try harder and make the  others take notice of you?
I believe in Master   with all my heart.
Even if I am the only one to  believe in him.
I won't ever feel lonesome, though.
Not if I keep thinking about Master  .
Hiyah! There is but one TRAINER  who has my respect.
And that is none other than my  MASTER at the FIGHTING DOJO.
You should become a fan of my  MASTER like me! Hiyah!
Hiyah!
Your battling style is most  educational.
I hope that you will keep plugging  away at success, hiyah!
Instead of just watching others  battle, battle yourself!
…My DOJO's MASTER chewed me out  like that…
But I won't let that stop me from  being your fan!
I can't stop being your fan!
Hiyah! I respect my MASTER at the  FIGHTING DOJO.
I will never become a fan of  anyone other than my MASTER!

Hiyah!

SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_T: Oh, man, oh, man!  Cool! Too cool!
Just the way you battle.  That's cool.
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_I: Looks like I'm the only one left  out of your fans.
But, you know, I like being an only  fan… It's less stressful.
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_L: 's cool, huh?  I love the way he talks.
I'd really relish a chance to meet  him in person once.
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_I: Huh, can you believe it?  Everyone turned into your fans.
So after all we've been through,  I'm the lone  fan?
Eh, being the one and only   fan's my style, anyway.
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_A: Oh, my goodness!  Is it really you, [Player]?
I have to tell you, I adore the  way you battle.
I hope you'll keep at it.  I'll be your number one fan!
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_I: Oh, my goodness!  If it isn't [Player]!
It's so disappointing… I realized  I'm your number-one-and-only fan!
Well, it can't be helped!  Let me cheer you on, at least!
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_T: The way he battles… It's just   the way that I like it!
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_E: Lately, all everyone talks about  is you.
I'm feeling lonesome because I  prefer .
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_Y: Amazing!  [Player], you really are amazing!
Instead of just watching, maybe  I should become a TRAINER, too.
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_I: I'm your only fan…  Sigh… This is lonely…
Can't you try harder and make the  others take notice of you?
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_W: Master  is so dignified…  He is so my type.
Why can't the others see the  dignity he simply oozes?
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_B: I believe in Master   with all my heart.
Even if I am the only one to  believe in him.
I won't ever feel lonesome, though.
Not if I keep thinking about Master  .
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_Y: Hiyah!
Your battling style is most  educational.
I hope that you will keep plugging  away at success, hiyah!
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_W: Instead of just watching others  battle, battle yourself!
…My DOJO's MASTER chewed me out  like that…
But I won't let that stop me from  being your fan!
I can't stop being your fan!
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_O: Hiyah! There is but one TRAINER  who has my respect.
And that is none other than my  MASTER at the FIGHTING DOJO.
You should become a fan of my  MASTER like me! Hiyah!
SaffronCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_N: Hiyah! I respect my MASTER at the  FIGHTING DOJO.
I will never become a fan of  anyone other than my MASTER!
I will even sneak out of the DOJO  to spread word of his greatness.

SeafoamIslands_B4F_EventScript_BoulderHi: Hint: Boulders might change the  flow of water.
Text_RockSlideTeach: When you're up on a rocky mountain  like this, rockslides are a threat.
Can you imagine?  Boulders tumbling down on you?
That'd be, like, waaaaaaaaaaah!  Total terror!
You don't seem to be scared.  Want to try using ROCK SLIDE?
Text_RockSlideDeclined: Oh, so you are scared after all.
Text_RockSlideWhichMon: Which POKéMON should I teach  ROCK SLIDE?
Text_RockSlideTaught: It might be scary to use it in this  tunnel…
SeafoamIslands_B4F_Text_BouldersMightCha: Hint: Boulders might change the  flow of water.

SevenIsland_EventScript_IslandSign: SEVEN ISLAND  Quest Island of Infinity
SevenIsland_EventScript_OldWoman: These islands are called the SEVII  ISLANDS because there are seven.
…Or at least that's what the young  people believe.
The truth is, these islands are so  named because they are said to  have been made in seven days.
SevenIsland_EventScript_Scientist: This island has been left virtually  untouched in its natural state.
It could be a little difficult to  hike around because of that.
Text_SwordsDanceTeach: Not many people come out here.
If I train here, I'm convinced that  I'll get stronger and stronger.
How would you like to learn a move  like that? It's SWORDS DANCE.
Text_SwordsDanceWhichMon: All right, pick which POKéMON  I should teach it to.
Text_SwordsDanceTaught: If only we could keep getting  stronger and stronger, eh?
SevenIsland_Text_IslandSign: SEVEN ISLAND  Quest Island of Infinity
SevenIsland_Text_IslandsMadeInSevenDays: These islands are called the SEVII  ISLANDS because there are seven.
…Or at least that's what the young  people believe.
The truth is, these islands are so  named because they are said to  have been made in seven days.
SevenIsland_Text_IslandVirtuallyUntouche: This island has been left virtually  untouched in its natural state.
It could be a little difficult to  hike around because of that.

SevenIsland_House_Room1_EventScript_Batt: Bravo, indeed!  What an astounding battle!
It was so astounding, why, it keeps  filling my eyes with tears!
The thrust and parry of expertly  used techniques!
The clash of power upon power!
Too bad!  I feel your disappointment.
However, that disappointment is  what will make you better.
Use it, learn from it, and make it  motivate you to seek greatness.
Forget not this disappointment  and redouble your training!
However, let me say that it was  a worthy spectacle.
I'd say it was a wonderful battle  with a real sense of depth!
SevenIsland_House_Room1_EventScript_OldW: I may not look like much now,  but when I was younger…
I flew everywhere, challenging  TRAINERS wherever I found them.
Now, my only source of enjoyment  is reminiscing about the past while  watching battles.
SevenIsland_House_Room1_EventScript_Inva: I may not look like much now,  but when I was younger…
I flew everywhere, challenging  TRAINERS wherever I found them.
Now, my only source of enjoyment  is reminiscing about the past while  watching battles.
SevenIsland_House_Room1_EventScript_Trai: Let me tell you something. There's  a hidden room in the basement.
A TRAINER named  is  waiting there now.
Tell me, you did come to challenge  , am I right?
Fine! Before your battle, would  you like to save your game?
All right.  Don't hold anything back!
SevenIsland_House_Room1_EventScript_Decl: Well, perhaps if you change your  mind, do come back.
SevenIsland_House_Room1_EventScript_Choo: Ah!  You will battle for me?
It was worth my time moving the  box aside, then.
… …  But there is one slight problem.
This hidden room is not built very  sturdy.
Can I get you to limit it to  battles of three POKéMON per side?
SevenIsland_House_Room1_EventScript_Box: There is a slight breeze blowing  around the box.
SevenIsland_House_Room1_Text_OnlyEnjoyme: I may not look like much now,  but when I was younger…
I flew everywhere, challenging  TRAINERS wherever I found them.
Now, my only source of enjoyment  is reminiscing about the past while  watching battles.

SevenIsland_Mart_EventScript_Lass: POKéMON have personalities of their  own, just like people.
My PIKACHU has a HASTY nature,  so it grew to be a speedy POKéMON.
SevenIsland_Mart_EventScript_Hiker: Okay, preparations are complete  for me to explore the RUINS.
SevenIsland_Mart_EventScript_Fisher: I need to fish on SEVEN ISLAND.
That will complete my fishing tour  of the SEVII ISLANDS.
I'd better stock up on some  POKé BALLS first, though.
SevenIsland_Mart_Text_MonHavePersonaliti: POKéMON have personalities of their  own, just like people.
My PIKACHU has a HASTY nature,  so it grew to be a speedy POKéMON.

That will complete my fishing tour  of the SEVII ISLANDS.
I'd better stock up on some  POKé BALLS first, though.

SevenIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript: On this island, different events  occur depending on connections.
They are for you to discover on  your own.
Did you ride a SEAGALLOP ferry  to get here?
There are at least ten of those  high-speed ships.
I don't know where they all go,  though.
If you're confident, you should  check out TRAINER TOWER.
SevenIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Events: On this island, different events  occur depending on connections.
They are for you to discover on  your own.
SevenIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_DidYou: Did you ride a SEAGALLOP ferry  to get here?
There are at least ten of those  high-speed ships.
I don't know where they all go,  though.
SevenIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CheckO: If you're confident, you should  check out TRAINER TOWER.

SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_CyndyPost: The way I am now, I may have to  hold off on TRAINER TOWER…
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_EvanIntro: It doesn't matter if you happen to  have the strongest POKéMON…
It doesn't mean a thing if you don't  know how to use them properly!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_EvanPostB: You see them every so often,  TRAINERS with awesome POKéMON  who have no idea what to do.
Before training POKéMON, TRAINERS  themselves need to grow up.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_JacksonIn: I work to protect the environment.  In turn, nature protects me!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_JacksonDe: Whoa! You're tough!  How about protecting me?
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_JacksonPo: From far out among the stars, our  planet is just a drop of water.
But we want to protect that drop  of water for everyone.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_KatelynIn: Those shoes you have are pretty  snazzy.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_KatelynDe: You're hot stuff in spite of your  cute looks.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_KatelynPo: Your mom bought those snazzy  RUNNING SHOES for you?
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_LeroyIntr: You look strong.  Let me battle you, please!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_LeroyDefe: I knew it!  You're as tough as I thought!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_LeroyPost: The way you battle has given me  a lot of useful data.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_MichelleI: I was given the best possible  education to become this strong.
I don't want to lose to anyone!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_MichelleD: Thank you. I feel like I've been  set free by losing to you.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_MichelleP: For some reason, I get furious  over the slightest thing.
I'll calm myself by breathing  deeply.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_LexIntro: LEX: My darling NYA, together  we could win!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_LexDefeat: LEX: I seem to have been too  careless…
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_LexPostBa: LEX: I think it was a good  experience for NYA.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_LexNotEno: LEX: May I ask you to battle the  both of us at the same time?
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_NyaIntro: NYA: I'll do my best so I won't  drag down my mentor, LEX!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_NyaDefeat: NYA: Oh, no…  I'm so sorry, I…
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_NyaPostBa: NYA: I think I'm going to need  much more seasoning and tutoring  under LEX…
…So, LEX, please, may I stay with  you like this?
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_NyaNotEno: NYA: I'm sorry, but may we battle  in two-on-two style?
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Text_BrunoTrai: Training by oneself is certainly  not a bad thing.
But it's also not bad to aim for  the top with a partner.
Even BRUNO…  He trained with a fellow by the  name of BRAWLY before.

SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Entrance_Event: TRAINERS are asked to refrain from  damaging plants in the CANYON.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_Entrance_Text_: Kyahaha!  I'll flick you away effortlessly!
Tch!  Too strong for me!
What's that?  I don't act the way I look?
Heh, that's a part of my strategy!
Howdy!  Are you a member of my fan club?
Oh, so you're not a fan…
Well, I can change that.  Let me sing for you!
Lalalah…  My POKéMON, I send them out,  all the girls scream and shout!
This island is too spread out…  It's not easy patrolling the place.
Uh-huh…
TRAINERS like you from cities,  they sure are tough.
You'll be headed for the TOWER,  won't you?
I punish people who abuse  POKéMON!
You don't seem to be a problem  TRAINER.
If you treat your POKéMON with  kindness, they'll understand.
EVE: I'll team up with JON and  battle together.
EVE: Me and JON, we lost.  Ehehe.
EVE: I'm going to work harder with  JON.
EVE: I want to team up with JON  when I battle you.
Come back with two POKéMON, okay?
JON: When I'm with EVE, it feels  like we could never lose.
JON: When I'm with EVE,  it doesn't feel like I've lost!
JON: When I'm with EVE, I feel  giddy whether I win or lose.
It's magical!
JON: If it's with EVE, I'll be  happy to battle with you.
So, I'd like to make it a  two-on-two battle, if I may.
SEVAULT CANYON ENTRANCE
TRAINERS are asked to refrain from  damaging plants in the CANYON.

SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_House_EventScr: You join in, too!  Dance, dance!
There, you're all chipper now!  Lucky!
You join in, too!  Dance, dance!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_House_Text_Cha: You join in, too!  Dance, dance!
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_House_Text_You: There, you're all chipper now!  Lucky!

SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_TanobyKey_Even: A mysterious rumble echoed  somewhere far away.
SevenIsland_SevaultCanyon_TanobyKey_Text: A mysterious rumble echoed  somewhere far away.

SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_BrandonIntr: Do you know anything about this  stone chamber?
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_BrandonDefe: That was uncalled for.  You didn't have to be so rough.
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_BrandonPost: The TANOBY RUINS date back at  least 1,500 years.
But it's a baffling mystery as to  why it was built in the first place.
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_BenjaminInt: A mystic POKéMON is said to sleep  inside here.
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_BenjaminDef: I'm not much good in battle.
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_BenjaminPos: I hear there are other ruins like  the one here.
Might they be the resting places  of other mystic POKéMON?
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_EdnaIntro: CLIFFORD is teaching me how to  paint.
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_EdnaDefeat: We might get in trouble for being  noisy here.
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_EdnaPostBat: I said that I wanted to paint an  old building.
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_CliffordInt: Today, in addition to our lesson,  we came to see the chamber.
SevenIsland_TanobyRuins_Text_CliffordPos: Ah, so you are studying POKéMON  on your own…
Yes, you certainly are quite the  extraordinary person, indeed.

SevenIsland_TrainerTower_EventScript_Tra: TRAINER TOWER ENTRANCE  Rise to the Challenge, TRAINERS!
SevenIsland_TrainerTower_Text_DarioPostB: In your future, I sense that you  will meet many others.
I think you will be linked to each  other by a strange power.
SevenIsland_TrainerTower_Text_RodetteInt: Somewhere on this island, peculiar  POKéMON are sleeping.
SevenIsland_TrainerTower_Text_RodettePos: Somewhere on this island, peculiar  POKéMON are sleeping.
Could it be that they're waiting  for you?
SevenIsland_TrainerTower_Text_TrainerTow: TRAINER TOWER ENTRANCE  Rise to the Challenge, TRAINERS!
SevenIsland_TrainerTower_Text_LooksLikeT: トレーナータワーには  いまは　はいれない　みたい‥
SevenIsland_TrainerTower_Text_TrainerTow: トレーナータワーが　あいてる！  さっそく　はいってみよう！

SilphCo_2F_EventScript_Connor: I work for both SILPH and TEAM  ROCKET.
SilphCo_2F_EventScript_Jerry: Can you solve the maze in here?  It's not easy, I tell you!
SilphCo_2F_EventScript_Grunt1: They're transporters for this  high-tech building.
SilphCo_2F_EventScript_Grunt2: SILPH CO. will be associated with  TEAM ROCKET!
SilphCo_2F_Text_ConnorDefeat: How did you know  I was a ROCKET?
SilphCo_2F_Text_ConnorPostBattle: I work for both SILPH and TEAM  ROCKET.
SilphCo_2F_Text_JerryPostBattle: Can you solve the maze in here?  It's not easy, I tell you!
SilphCo_2F_Text_Grunt1Intro: No kids are allowed in here!
SilphCo_2F_Text_Grunt1PostBattle: They're transporters for this  high-tech building.
SilphCo_2F_Text_Grunt2Intro: Hey, kid!  What are you wandering here for?
SilphCo_2F_Text_Grunt2PostBattle: SILPH CO. will be associated with  TEAM ROCKET!
Text_ThunderWaveTeach: Oh, you're not with TEAM ROCKET.  I'm sorry, I thought…
Will you forgive me if I teach  you the THUNDER WAVE technique?
Text_ThunderWaveDeclined: Oh…  But THUNDER WAVE is convenient…
Text_ThunderWaveWhichMon: Which POKéMON should I teach  THUNDER WAVE?
Text_ThunderWaveTaught: THUNDER WAVE causes paralysis in  the target POKéMON.
A paralyzed POKéMON may be unable  to move in battle.
It's an ELECTRIC-type move, so it  won't work on some POKéMON.

SilphCo_3F_EventScript_WorkerMRocketsGon: [Player]!  You and your POKéMON saved us!
SilphCo_3F_EventScript_Jose: TEAM ROCKET said that if I helped  them, they'd let me study POKéMON.

SilphCo_3F_Text_JoseIntro: I support TEAM ROCKET more than  I support SILPH CO.!

SilphCo_7F_EventScript_RivalScene: [Rival]: Hahaha! I thought you'd  turn up if I waited here!
I guess TEAM ROCKET slowed you  down! Not that I care!
I saw you in SAFFRON, so I decided  to see if you got better!
Well, [Player]!  I'm moving on up and ahead!
By checking my POKéDEX, I'm  starting to see what's strong and  how they evolve!
Am I a genius or what?
I'm going to the POKéMON LEAGUE to  boot out the ELITE FOUR.
I'll become the world's most  powerful TRAINER!
[Player], well, good luck to you!  Don't sweat it!  Smell ya!
SilphCo_7F_EventScript_LaprasGuy: Oh! Hi! You're not a ROCKET!  You came to save us?  Why, thank you!
I want you to have this POKéMON  for saving us.
SilphCo_7F_EventScript_EndReceiveLapras: It's a LAPRAS.  It's a very intelligent POKéMON.
We kept it in our lab, but it will  be much better off with you.
I think you will be a good TRAINER  for LAPRAS!
It's a good swimmer.  It'll give you a lift across water!
SilphCo_7F_EventScript_AlreadyGotLapras: TEAM ROCKET's BOSS went to the  boardroom!
Is our PRESIDENT okay?  I'm worried.

SixIsland_DottedHole_SapphireRoom_EventS: I was right in tailing you!
I knew that there was a SAPPHIRE  here, so it belongs to me!
I'll sell it to TEAM ROCKET for  serious money.
If you want it back, why don't you  go get it after I sell it?
I'll even tell you one of the  passwords to TEAM ROCKET's  WAREHOUSE.
The WAREHOUSE password I know is  “Yes, nah, CHANSEY.”
I'm done.  Don't think badly of me!

SixIsland_House_EventScript_OldMan: There's nothing that young people'd  find exciting here on this island.
But, this is a good place in terms  of nature and history.
SixIsland_House_Text_GoodPlaceForNatureA: There's nothing that young people'd  find exciting here on this island.
But, this is a good place in terms  of nature and history.

SixIsland_Mart_EventScript_Picnicker: I should buy some MAIL and write  him a letter…
SixIsland_Mart_Text_AgathaOldestEverElit: Play with POKéMON lots and live  a long life!
She set a record for being the  oldest-ever ELITE FOUR member.
She spurs me to do bigger things.
SixIsland_Mart_Text_ShouldBuyMailAndWrit: I should buy some MAIL and write  him a letter…

SixIsland_OutcastIsland_EventScript_Rock: So listen, you haven't seen any  rare POKéMON, have you?
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_RocketIntro: There're no rare POKéMON around  these parts! Not a one!
That burns me up, man.  I'll take it out on you!
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_RocketPostB: So listen, you haven't seen any  rare POKéMON, have you?
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_TylorIntro: I'm having no luck at all.  A battle'd be a change of pace!
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_TylorPostBa: I can't very well go home without  catching something, though.
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_MymoIntro: I swam here from SIX ISLE PORT  in one go.
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_MymoPostBat: I'm only at the halfway point…  I'm beat…
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_NicoleIntro: It's not so easy sending POKéMON  out while swimming, you know?
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_NicoleDefea: I didn't lose to you at swimming.  This doesn't bother me.
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_NicolePostB: Are you headed for the island up  past here?
I didn't see anything interesting  there.
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_AvaIntro: AVA: Let's have a two-on-two  marine battle!
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_AvaDefeat: AVA: Oh, you're amazing!  Even better, you're on your own!
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_AvaPostBatt: AVA: You know, I do prefer the  sea over any pool.
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_AvaNotEnoug: AVA: You're challenging us to  a battle?
You'll need at least two POKéMON  if you want to do that.
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_GebIntro: GEB: Big Sister, help!  Please battle with me!
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_GebDefeat: GEB: Wow, Big Sister, this person's  really good!
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_GebPostBatt: GEB: I'm hanging onto my sister  because I can't touch the bottom.
SixIsland_OutcastIsland_Text_GebNotEnoug: GEB: Please battle against me and  my sister!

SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Bethan: In the same way your mother raised  you full of love, you should raise  your POKéMON.
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Alliso: I'm not saying that you shouldn't  catch POKéMON.
I just want people to raise their  POKéMON responsibly.
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Garret: There's a girl near the BUSH who  measures HERACROSS for TRAINERS.
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Jonah: By the way, “appeal” is a weird  word, if you think about it.
Like, is it like an orange peel?  Or like a ringing bell?
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Vance: I'm going to bring my little brother  here next time.
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Nash: The funny patterns on the ground…
They look like the patterns on my  grandpa's clothes.
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Cordel: Ayup, you townies come around all  so dandy with a hat that flashy…
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Dalia: When you can't exhale anymore,  inhale the clean air!
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Joana: I'm going to keep on collecting  BUG POKéMON.
Am I the only girl like that?
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Riley: I'm going to observe the night sky  here.
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Marcy: A little cut like that…  A little spit's enough to cure it!
SixIsland_PatternBush_EventScript_Layton: There are places here in PATTERN  BUSH where grass won't grow.
What could be the cause of such  a phenomenon?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_BethanyIntro: I'm curious, how do you raise your  POKéMON?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_BethanyDefeat: You raise your POKéMON with a  whole lot of love!
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_BethanyPostBa: In the same way your mother raised  you full of love, you should raise  your POKéMON.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_AllisonIntro: I'm working to preserve the natural  ecology of POKéMON here.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_AllisonDefeat: Oh, for someone so young, you are  tremendous!
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_AllisonPostBa: I'm not saying that you shouldn't  catch POKéMON.
I just want people to raise their  POKéMON responsibly.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_GarretIntro: I caught a BUG POKéMON that lives  only around here!
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_GarretPostBat: There's a girl near the BUSH who  measures HERACROSS for TRAINERS.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_JonahIntro: You know, it just doesn't feel right  if I don't use BUG POKéMON.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_JonahDefeat: It's okay, losing is a fun part of  POKéMON's appeal, too.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_JonahPostBatt: By the way, “appeal” is a weird  word, if you think about it.
Like, is it like an orange peel?  Or like a ringing bell?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_VanceIntro: Yeah, yeah, yeah!  Look at all the BUG POKéMON!
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_VanceDefeat: I got beat while I was still busy  celebrating!
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_VancePostBatt: I'm going to bring my little brother  here next time.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_NashIntro: Look, look! There are funny  patterns on the ground.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_NashPostBattl: The funny patterns on the ground…
They look like the patterns on my  grandpa's clothes.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_CordellIntro: I bet you think I'm just some guy,  don't you, eh?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_CordellDefeat: I bet you think I'm weak,  don't you, eh?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_CordellPostBa: Ayup, you townies come around all  so dandy with a hat that flashy…
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_DaliaIntro: Take a deep breath.  Isn't the air delicious?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_DaliaDefeat: If you'd like, I can teach you how  to breathe properly.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_DaliaPostBatt: When you can't exhale anymore,  inhale the clean air!
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_JoanaIntro: I love BUG POKéMON.  That's why I'm here all the time.
Am I the only girl like that?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_JoanaDefeat: I lost, but I'm still laughing.  Am I the only girl like that?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_JoanaPostBatt: I'm going to keep on collecting  BUG POKéMON.
Am I the only girl like that?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_RileyIntro: This is a good spot.  I'll pitch my tent here.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_RileyPostBatt: I'm going to observe the night sky  here.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_MarcyIntro: Oh, yuck!  I think a bug stung me!
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_MarcyDefeat: It wasn't a bug.  I cut my shin on some grass.
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_MarcyPostBatt: A little cut like that…  A little spit's enough to cure it!
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_LaytonIntro: Have you noticed something odd  about these parts?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_LaytonDefeat: Have you taken a good look around  your feet?
SixIsland_PatternBush_Text_LaytonPostBat: There are places here in PATTERN  BUSH where grass won't grow.
What could be the cause of such  a phenomenon?

SixIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_R: [Rival]: Hey, [Player]!  How's your POKéDEX filling up?
It looks like it's impossible to get  all the POKéMON by hanging around  just these parts.
Maybe there are POKéMON we don't  know about somewhere far away…
Well, if I can't do it, there's no  way for you to get it done.
I'm not going to get all desperate  over this.
I'll keep collecting POKéMON at my  own pace while I train them.
That's what I'll do.  So there's no point staying here.  I may as well leave for home.
That's that, then!  Smell ya later!

I get this feeling that there's  something hidden on this island.
SixIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript_O: You know of POKéMON that evolve  only upon trading, yes?
But did you know that there are  still others?
Some POKéMON evolve only when  traded while holding specific items.

I get this feeling that there's  something hidden on this island.

But did you know that there are  still others?

SixIsland_RuinValley_EventScript_Scienti: I can't figure out how I'm supposed  to get inside.
Let me tell you, I found this  place.
Don't look so envious, will you?
SixIsland_RuinValley_EventScript_DottedH: The door doesn't budge at all.  Check it more thoroughly?
On closer inspection, there are  several dots on the door…

Don't look so envious, will you?

SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_StanlyIntro: There appear to be many secrets  still unsolved in this world.
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_StanlyPostBatt: I suggest to you that you, too,  give a thought to the secrets and  mysteries of our world once a day.
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_FosterIntro: I'm curious, what compelled you to  come here?

The majority of them date back  a long way.
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_LarryIntro: It's been said that there are  mysterious stones on this island.
I suspect it has something to do  with the ruins here.
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_LarryPostBattl: I haven't had any luck in finding  how I can get inside.
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_DarylIntro: A battle with you, so high up!
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_DarylDefeat: Oh, the heartbreak of losing so  easily to you!
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_HectorIntro: I'm pretty familiar with the land  around these parts.
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_HectorDefeat: You don't need to be so pushy.  I'll be happy to tell you.
SixIsland_RuinValley_Text_HectorPostBatt: The door to the ruins…  It has these strange patterns  engraved on the outside.
I don't know what they mean,  though.

SixIsland_WaterPath_EventScript_RouteSig: WATER PATH  Leads to RUIN VALLEY
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_RoseIntro: I let a pleasant breeze lead me  all the way here.
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_RoseDefeat: Giggle… You're so cute when you're  determined.
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_RosePostBattle: I want to go to the woods over  there, but…
There are lots of BUG POKéMON.  They scare me a little.

SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_EdwardPostBattl: As a performer, I don't want people  to know about the effort I put in.
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_SamirIntro: What, you're suggesting that you're  sick of seeing SWIMMERS like me?
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_SamirPostBattle: I couldn't lift the stigma of being  a SWIMMER…
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_DeniseIntro: My boyfriend's always busy, so I  come swimming by myself.
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_DeniseDefeat: Awww, I knew this would happen!
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_DenisePostBattl: When I can't be with my boyfriend,  I spend time with the POKéMON he  gave me.
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_EarlIntro: Tell me, where are the mountains  around these parts?
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_EarlDefeat: I lost my way while I was busy  battling!
SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_EarlPostBattle: Aren't there any mountains around  these parts?

SixIsland_WaterPath_Text_MiuPostBattle: MIU: It makes me all sad inside  when we lose…

ThreeIsland_EventScript_AntiBiker1GotFul: You've got seriously impressive  POKéMON with you.
ThreeIsland_EventScript_GiveFullRestore: Thank you! Those goons were  nothing but bad trouble.
Oh, look, your POKéMON got hurt  on my account.
You've got seriously impressive  POKéMON with you.
ThreeIsland_EventScript_BikerArgumentSce: We don't need you people bringing  your noise and trouble here!
We're asking you to go back to  KANTO!
Hey, go cry somewhere else.  Our boss is on his way.
When he gets here, we'll give you  a k-rad motorbike show you won't  soon forget!
W-what!? Not on your life!  Get off the island now!
ThreeIsland_EventScript_AntiBiker2Bikers: It'd be fantastic if someone as  strong as you lived here.
I hope you'll at least stay here  a while.
…I beg your pardon?  You're looking for LOSTELLE?
LOSTELLE went off towards BOND  BRIDGE a while ago.
ThreeIsland_EventScript_BikerBossIntroTr: Are you the boss?  Go back to KANTO right now!
What's with the hostile attitude?  It's mighty cold of you!
Your gang of followers have been  raising havoc on their bikes.
Do you have any idea how much  trouble they've caused us on the  island?
No, man, I don't get it at all.
Look at this place.  What do you do for entertainment?
You ought to be thanking us for  livening up this sleepy village.
But hey, if you insist, you can try  making us leave.
Grr… You cowards…  So tough in a pack…
ThreeIsland_EventScript_BattleBikersScen: You, what are you staring at?  Don't you know it's not polite?
You wanna make something of it  or what?
Heh, I like your guts.  You'll be losing money to me, but…
Aww, man…  Don't you dare laugh!
Aren't you from KANTO?  You should be on our side!
What's the matter with you,  getting all hot like that?
We invited the boss out here,  but you had to mess it up!
Boss, I'm telling you, you've gotta  do something about this kid!
I've been watching you, and I'd say  you've done enough.
What are you, their friend or  something?
Then I guess you'll be battling me  in their place.
Humph! Yeah, go right on hanging  around with these hayseeds!
ThreeIsland_EventScript_LeaveBikersAlone: That's smart.  Keep your nose out of this.
ThreeIsland_EventScript_Woman: THREE ISLAND is actually the most  populous of the islands here.
Still, it could be less sleepy.
But I wouldn't want to see goons  like those BIKERS here again.
ThreeIsland_EventScript_LittleBoy: I'm going to train my DODUO in the  BERRY FOREST.
When it evolves, I'm going to play  a game on TWO ISLAND.

ThreeIsland_BerryForest_EventScript_Lost: LOSTELLE: Whimper… Sniff…  Oh! Please, help!
A scary POKéMON appeared there  a little while ago.
It kept scaring.  It made LOSTELLE scared.
I'm too scared to move!  But I want to go home…
Oh! Here it comes again!  No! Go away! It's scaring me!
Ohh! That was so scary!  Thank you!
LOSTELLE came to pick some  BERRIES.
LOSTELLE's scared, so can I go  with you to my daddy's house?

ThreeIsland_BondBridge_EventScript_BondB: BOND BRIDGE  Please be quiet when crossing.
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_NikkiIntro: The salty tang of the sea…  It tickles my heart.
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_NikkiPostBat: Perhaps that reek is your sweaty  POKéMON's body odor…
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_VioletIntro: Where are you off to in such  a hurry?
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_VioletPostBa: If you keep going this way, you'll  eventually reach BERRY FOREST.
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_AmiraIntro: My mommy said that I can't swim  without my float ring.
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_AmiraPostBat: This year, I'm going to finally  learn how to swim!
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_AlexisPostBa: Did I just win?  Or did I lose?
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_TishaIntro: Oh, no, don't come here!  Please, stay away from me!
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_TishaDefeat: Okay, you've won!  Now will you please go away?
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_TishaPostBat: A POKéMON bit through my   swimsuit.
I can't get out of the water!
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_JoyIntro: JOY: We'll teach you what our  favorite POKéMON is!
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_JoyPostBattl: JOY: Wasn't that fun?  I hope we can battle again!
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_JoyNotEnough: JOY: I really want to battle with  MEG.
ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_MegIntro: MEG: We'll show you our favorite  POKéMON.

ThreeIsland_BondBridge_Text_BondBridgeSi: BOND BRIDGE  Please be quiet when crossing.

ThreeIsland_DunsparceTunnel_EventScript_: What am I doing here, you ask?  Why, I'm prospecting for gold!
When I strike it rich, I'm buying  a house in KANTO.
Hey, there! How's it going?  Did you hear? I've struck gold!
You remembered that I was  prospecting, didn't you?
You can't begin to imagine just  how happy I am.
So, I'll show you!  This is for you!
Whoops, your BAG is crammed full!  I'll give this to you later.
I can't give you any nuggets of  wisdom, so that'll have to do!

ThreeIsland_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScript: It's impossible to SURF between the  islands around these parts.
The tides are too fast and  treacherous.
Let's crush BERRIES!  …That'd be wasting BERRIES?
You can always find some BERRIES  on the ground in BERRY FOREST.
Hey, did you hear the news?
The PC network here can now link  with PCs in KANTO.
I don't know how that came about,  but it's fantastic!

TrainerTower_Lobby_EventScript_LostChall: I think you put in a tremendous  effort in your battling.
Please come back and try again!
TrainerTower_Lobby_EventScript_ExitChall: When the TRAINERS switch places,  the movement can be hectic.
To avoid the stampede, we moved  the reception counter here.
TrainerTower_Lobby_EventScript_Reception: I hope you give it your best.
TrainerTower_Lobby_EventScript_EntryTrig: Welcome to TRAINER TOWER where  TRAINERS gather from all over!
TRAINERS from all over the world  gather here to battle.
Right now, there are TRAINERS only  up to Floor .
TrainerTower_Lobby_EventScript_AllFloors: TRAINERS are awaiting your  challenge up to the eighth floor.
TrainerTower_Lobby_EventScript_Challenge: Here at TRAINER TOWER, there is an  event called TIME ATTACK.
You will be timed on how quickly  you can get from the reception  counter to the OWNER on the roof.
The best times will be recorded on  the Time Board.
Try competing with friends to see  who can beat it the fastest.
You will not earn any EXP. Points  or money by beating TRAINERS here.
TrainerTower_Lobby_EventScript_BeginChal: Okay, I'll get the clock started,  so give it everything you have.

I wonder what kinds of TRAINERS  are waiting for me?
