TwoIsland_EventScript_Sailor: That fellow there, he moved here  from CELADON CITY.
He started up a shop with his  younger brother.
You have to wonder if he knew what  he was getting into.
TwoIsland_EventScript_Woman: The shopkeeper's brother took  a job at the GAME CORNER.
He's trying to pull together money  so they can buy more merchandise.
TwoIsland_EventScript_Beauty: A famous TRAINER came to the  ISLAND a little while back.
He's one of the ELITE FOUR.  His name is BRUNO.
He went away disappointed when he  found out that they were all sold  out of Rage Candybars.
TwoIsland_EventScript_PokeManiac: The discerning TRAINER knows to  buy rare items here!
TwoIsland_EventScript_Boy: There's an old woman who lives in  a cottage out on the cape.
She gives the eye to POKéMON.  It's a bit unnerving.

TwoIsland_Text_WelcomeToShopMerchandiseL: Oh!  Hello, welcome to my shop!
Our merchandise is limited, but I  hope we can serve your needs.
TwoIsland_Text_AddedMerchandiseForLostel: I can't tell you how grateful I am  for your rescue of LOSTELLE.
Thanks to your feat, the people of  THREE ISLAND have changed their  attitudes about KANTO people.
And, I'm from KANTO, you see.
The people of THREE ISLAND  helped me add to my merchandise.
TwoIsland_Text_HopeYouGiveItYourBest: Hi! I'm giving it my best here.  I hope you do too, [Player].
TwoIsland_Text_BringingItemsFromDistantL: I've started bringing in items from  distant lands.
I've got some rare items in, too.  Please have a look!
TwoIsland_Text_FellowMovedFromCeladonCit: That fellow there, he moved here  from CELADON CITY.
He started up a shop with his  younger brother.
You have to wonder if he knew what  he was getting into.
TwoIsland_Text_ShopkeepersBrotherWorksGa: The shopkeeper's brother took  a job at the GAME CORNER.
He's trying to pull together money  so they can buy more merchandise.
TwoIsland_Text_BrunoCameToIslandWhileBac: A famous TRAINER came to the  ISLAND a little while back.
He's one of the ELITE FOUR.  His name is BRUNO.
He went away disappointed when he  found out that they were all sold  out of Rage Candybars.
TwoIsland_Text_BuyRareItemsHere: The discerning TRAINER knows to  buy rare items here!
TwoIsland_Text_OldWomanLivesOutOnCape: There's an old woman who lives in  a cottage out on the cape.
She gives the eye to POKéMON.  It's a bit unnerving.
TwoIsland_Text_HaveYouTriedJumpingGame: Boing! Boing!  Have you tried the jumping game?
The POKéMON you can enter…  Boing!

Text_UltimateMoveThatMon: I perfected the ultimate move of  its type…
But will no one take it for  future use?
Text_AllowMeToTeachMonUltimateMove: Oh! This is the one!  This is the POKéMON!
This  is worthy of  learning my ultimate move!
Will you allow your  to  learn my ?
Text_YouRejectIt: Gaah! You reject it?  No, I won't be dissuaded!
Text_LetMeConferUltimateMove: Then, let me confer my ultimate   on your .
Text_TaughtMove: I didn't think I could teach that  move while I still lived…
Text_MakeBestUseOfMove: I implore you to make the best  use of that move and gain power!
Text_PassedOnEverythingIKnow: I have no regrets now.  I've passed on everything I know.
Now I can live out my life knowing  my work is done.
Text_FeelRejuvenated: After I passed on my knowledge to  you, I felt so much relief.
In fact, I feel rejuvenated,  as if I were younger again!

TwoIsland_JoyfulGameCorner_EventScript_F: So you rescued LOSTELLE?  How can I thank you?
Daddy didn't know you were scared  and in trouble!
LOSTELLE: It's okay, Daddy.  I got to be friends with [Player]!
TwoIsland_JoyfulGameCorner_EventScript_H: Now, where's LOSTELLE gotten to  today?
She always brings me lunch every  day right about now…
Hm? You, there!  Are you a friend of LOSTELLE's?
Have you seen LOSTELLE around?  I don't know where she might be.  She should've been here long ago.
LOSTELLE's a cutie - she got my  looks - so what if someone…
What if something's happened to  my LOSTELLE?!
Please, help me find her!  Please go search THREE ISLAND!
Hah? What is this GAME CORNER?  How much sadder can this get?
They said they'd be waiting on the  island, so where are they?
Hey, you! Is this the only THREE  ISLAND around here?
Try waking up before you crawl out  of bed, you punk.
Move it! Get your filthy motorbike  out of my place!
Would you look at that?  That punk scuffed up my floor.
TwoIsland_JoyfulGameCorner_EventScript_I: I'm sorry.  We're not running any games today.
TwoIsland_JoyfulGameCorner_EventScript_G: We'll get the games going soon  for you!
TwoIsland_JoyfulGameCorner_EventScript_L: Hey, but listen! I'm begging you,  you have to go to THREE ISLAND.
If anything were to happen to my  LOSTELLE…
My place is the house with the red  roof on THREE ISLAND.
She may just show up late here,  so I can't run off anywhere.
That's why I have to get you to do  me this big favor.
TwoIsland_JoyfulGameCorner_EventScript_G: Oh, what's that?  You're saying that this is for me?
How did you know that I love rare  rocks and gems?
You sure know how to make a guy  happy.
Oh, I see, this is from BILL!  You have to thank him for me!
You know, you've been fantastic.  I want you to have this.
All right, I'll get the GAME CORNER  running right away.
You have to come visit with a  friend.
TwoIsland_JoyfulGameCorner_EventScript_N: Your BAG's not going to fit another  thing…
TwoIsland_JoyfulGameCorner_EventScript_L: Please show me you being cool  again!

VermilionCity_Mart_EventScript_Cooltrain: I think POKéMON can be good or  bad. It depends on the TRAINER.
VermilionCity_Mart_EventScript_BaldingMa: There are wicked people who will  use POKéMON for criminal acts.
TEAM ROCKET traffics in rare  POKéMON, for example.
They also abandon POKéMON that  they consider unpopular or useless.
That's the sort of horrid people  they are, TEAM ROCKET.

VermilionCity_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScri: My POKéMON was poisoned!  It fainted while we were walking!
Even if they are the same level,  POKéMON can have very different  stats and abilities.
A POKéMON raised by a TRAINER is  stronger than one in the wild.
It is true that a higher-level  POKéMON will be more powerful…
But, all POKéMON will have weak  points against specific types.
So, there appears to be no  universally strong POKéMON.
VermilionCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trai: Even if they are the same level,  POKéMON can have very different  stats and abilities.

VermilionCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Urge: The urge to battle with someone  you've tangled with before…
Have you ever had that urge?  I'm sure you have.
I wanted to battle certain people  again over and over, too.
So, I've been giving these away.  Please, take one!
VermilionCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_UseD: Use that device and you'll find  TRAINERS looking for a rematch.
You have to charge its battery to  use it, though.
VermilionCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Expl: How do you use the VS SEEKER?  There's nothing to it.
Use it like beep-beep-beep, and  TRAINERS around you will notice.
If any TRAINER wants a rematch,  it will let you know immediately.
Charge its battery and use it  while you're on a road.

VermilionCity_PokemonFanClub_EventScript: I chair the POKéMON Fan Club!
I raise more than a hundred  POKéMON!
I'm very fussy when it comes to  POKéMON! I surely am!
So…
Did you come visit to hear about  my POKéMON?
Oh. Come back when you want to  hear my story!
Hello, [Player]!
Did you come see me about my  POKéMON again?
No?  Too bad!
Good!  Then listen up!
My favorite RAPIDASH…
It's…cute…lovely…smart…   plus…amazing…you think so?…  oh yes…it's…stunning…  kindly…love it!
Hug it…when…sleeping…warm  and cuddly…spectacular…  ravishing…  …Oops! Look at the time!  I kept you too long!
Thanks for hearing me out!  I want you to have this!
Take that BIKE VOUCHER to the  BIKE SHOP in CERULEAN CITY.
Exchange that for a BICYCLE  free of charge!
Don't worry, my favorite FEAROW  will FLY me anywhere I need to go.
So, I have no need for a BICYCLE.
I hope you like cycling!
Make room for this!
Our CHAIRMAN is very vocal about  POKéMON.
Our CHAIRMAN really does adore his  POKéMON.
But the person who is most liked by  POKéMON is DAISY, I think.
I just adore my SEEL!  It's so lovable!
It squeals, “Kyuuuh,” when I  hug it!
Oh, dear!
My SEEL is far more attractive.  By double, I would say.
Won't you admire my PIKACHU's  adorable tail?
Humph!
My PIKACHU is twice as cute as  that one!
PIKACHU: Chu! Pikachu!
SEEL: Kyuoo!
Let's all listen politely to other  TRAINERS!
If someone brags, brag right back!

VictoryRoad_1F_EventScript_Naomi: I never wanted to lose to anybody,  especially to a younger kid…
VictoryRoad_1F_EventScript_Rolando: Tch!  I concede, you are better than I!
VictoryRoad_1F_Text_NaomiIntro: I wonder if you are good enough  for me?
VictoryRoad_1F_Text_NaomiPostBattle: I never wanted to lose to anybody,  especially to a younger kid…
VictoryRoad_1F_Text_RolandoIntro: I can see you're good.  Let me see exactly how good!
VictoryRoad_1F_Text_RolandoPostBattle: Tch!  I concede, you are better than I!

VictoryRoad_2F_EventScript_Dawson: I can beat you when it comes to  knowledge about POKéMON!
VictoryRoad_2F_EventScript_Daisuke: If you get stuck, try moving some  boulders around.
VictoryRoad_2F_EventScript_Gregory: Many TRAINERS give up their  challenge here and go home.
VictoryRoad_2F_EventScript_Vincent: You earned the right to be on  VICTORY ROAD…
VictoryRoad_2F_Text_DawsonIntro: If you can get through here,  you can go meet the ELITE FOUR.
VictoryRoad_2F_Text_DawsonPostBattle: I can beat you when it comes to  knowledge about POKéMON!
VictoryRoad_2F_Text_DaisukeIntro: This here is VICTORY ROAD.  It's the final test for TRAINERS!
VictoryRoad_2F_Text_DaisukePostBattle: If you get stuck, try moving some  boulders around.
VictoryRoad_2F_Text_NelsonIntro: Ah, so you wish to challenge the  ELITE FOUR?
VictoryRoad_2F_Text_VincentPostBattle: You earned the right to be on  VICTORY ROAD…
VictoryRoad_2F_Text_GregoryPostBattle: Many TRAINERS give up their  challenge here and go home.

VictoryRoad_3F_EventScript_George: So, it was you who beat GIOVANNI  of TEAM ROCKET?
VictoryRoad_3F_EventScript_Colby: All TRAINERS here are headed to  the POKéMON LEAGUE.
VictoryRoad_3F_EventScript_Caroline: You showed me just how good  I was…
VictoryRoad_3F_EventScript_Alexa: By fighting tough battles, you get  stronger.
VictoryRoad_3F_EventScript_Ray: RAY: You've beaten us.  Greatness remains elusive…
VictoryRoad_3F_EventScript_Tyra: TYRA: You've taught me that power  can be infinite in shape and form.
Text_DoubleEdgeTeach: You should be proud of yourself,  having battled your way through  VICTORY ROAD so courageously.
In recognition of your feat,  I'll teach you DOUBLE-EDGE.
Would you like me to teach that  technique?
Text_DoubleEdgeDeclined: I'll teach you the technique  anytime.
Text_DoubleEdgeWhichMon: Which POKéMON should I teach  DOUBLE-EDGE?
Text_DoubleEdgeTaught: Keep that drive going for the  POKéMON LEAGUE!
Take a run at them and knock 'em  out!
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_GeorgeIntro: I heard rumors of a child prodigy.
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_GeorgePostBattle: So, it was you who beat GIOVANNI  of TEAM ROCKET?
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_AlexaIntro: TRAINERS live to seek stronger  opponents.
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_AlexaPostBattle: By fighting tough battles, you get  stronger.
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_CarolineIntro: I'll show you just how good you  are. Not!
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_CarolinePostBattle: You showed me just how good  I was…
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_ColbyIntro: Only the chosen can pass here!
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_ColbyPostBattle: All TRAINERS here are headed to  the POKéMON LEAGUE.
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_RayIntro: RAY: Together, the two of us are  destined for greatness!
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_RayPostBattle: RAY: You've beaten us.  Greatness remains elusive…
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_RayNotEnoughMons: RAY: Together, the two of us are  striving for the pinnacle.
We need you to bring two POKéMON  into battle with us.
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_TyraIntro: TYRA: We're trying to become  champions together.
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_TyraPostBattle: TYRA: You've taught me that power  can be infinite in shape and form.
VictoryRoad_3F_Text_TyraNotEnoughMons: TYRA: You can't battle with us if  you have only one POKéMON.

ViridianCity_EventScript_CitySign: VIRIDIAN CITY   The Eternally Green Paradise
ViridianCity_EventScript_TrainerTips1: Catch POKéMON and expand your  collection.
The more you have, the easier it  is to battle.
ViridianCity_EventScript_TrainerTips2: The battle moves of POKéMON are  limited by their POWER POINTS, PP.
To replenish PP, rest your tired  POKéMON at a POKéMON CENTER.
ViridianCity_EventScript_Boy: Those POKé BALLS at your waist!  You have POKéMON, don't you?
It's great that you can carry and  use POKéMON anytime, anywhere.
ViridianCity_EventScript_OldMan: This POKéMON GYM is always closed.
I wonder who the LEADER is?
ViridianCity_EventScript_AskIfTeachyTVHe: Well, now, I've had my coffee, and  that's what I need to get going!
But I made it too strong.  It gave me a headache…
Incidentally, is my old TEACHY TV  helping you?
Wahaha!  It's my grandson on the show!
Since he's the one doing the  teaching, you're bound to learn.
ViridianCity_EventScript_TeachyTVNotHelp: Hm… You're too busy to not even  have the time for TEACHY TV…
Time is money, and neither should  be ill spent…
ViridianCity_EventScript_TutorialComplet: Well, now, I've had my coffee, and  that's what I need to get going!
But I made it too strong.  It gave me a headache…
Incidentally, are you filling your  POKéDEX?
At first, focus on weakening the  POKéMON before trying to catch it.
ViridianCity_EventScript_WatchToLearnBas: If there's something you don't  understand, watch that.
It will teach you about the basics  of being a POKéMON TRAINER.
ViridianCity_EventScript_TutorialUnused: There! Now tell me, that was  educational, was it not?
ViridianCity_EventScript_TutorialNotRead: I absolutely forbid you from  going through here!
ViridianCity_EventScript_Youngster: You want to know about the two  kinds of caterpillar POKéMON?
ViridianCity_EventScript_YoungsterExplai: CATERPIE has no poison,  but WEEDLE does.
Watch that your POKéMON aren't  stabbed by WEEDLE's POISON STING.
ViridianCity_EventScript_Woman: I go shopping in PEWTER CITY  occasionally.
I have to take the winding trail in  VIRIDIAN FOREST when I go.
ViridianCity_EventScript_WomanRoadBlocke: Oh, Grandpa!  Don't be so mean!
I'm so sorry.  He hasn't had his coffee yet.
ViridianCity_EventScript_RoadBlocked: I absolutely forbid you from  going through here!
ViridianCity_EventScript_DoTutorialBattl: Well, now, I've had my coffee, and  that's what I need to get going!
Hm?  What is that red box you have?
Ah, so you're working on your  POKéDEX.
Then let me give you a word of  advice.
Whenever you catch a POKéMON,  the POKéDEX automatically updates  its data.
…You don't know how to catch  a POKéMON?
I suppose I had better show you  then!
There! Now tell me, that was  educational, was it not?
If there's something you don't  understand, watch that.
It will teach you about the basics  of being a POKéMON TRAINER.

It's great that you can carry and  use POKéMON anytime, anywhere.

I wonder who the LEADER is?

ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_Giovanni: Having lost in this fashion,   I can't face my followers.  I have betrayed their trust.
As of today, TEAM ROCKET is  finished forever!
As for myself, I shall dedicate  my life to training again.
Let us meet again someday!  Farewell!
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_GiveTM26: The EARTHBADGE makes POKéMON of  any level obey without question.
It is evidence of your mastery as  a POKéMON TRAINER.
With it, you can challenge the  POKéMON LEAGUE.
Consider it a gift for your POKéMON  LEAGUE challenge.
It is a powerful attack that causes  a massive tremor.
I made it when I ran the GYM here,  far too long ago…
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_NoRoomForTM: You do not have space for this!
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_Jason: Do you know the identity of our  GYM LEADER?
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_Kiyo: If my POKéMON were as good at  karate as I…
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_Takashi: The POKéMON LEAGUE?  You? Don't get cocky!
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_Samuel: You can go on to the POKéMON  LEAGUE only by defeating our GYM  LEADER!
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_Yuji: You'll need power to keep up with  our GYM LEADER.
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_Warren: The LEADER will scold me for  losing this way…
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuy: Even I don't know the VIRIDIAN  LEADER's identity.
But one thing's certain.  This will be the toughest of all  the GYM LEADERS.
Also, I heard that the TRAINERS  here like GROUND-type POKéMON.
ViridianCity_Gym_EventScript_GymGuyPostV: Blow me away! GIOVANNI was the  GYM LEADER of VIRIDIAN?
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_GiovanniIntro: It shall be so until I can restore  TEAM ROCKET to its former glory.
But, you have found me again.  So be it.  This time, I'm not holding back!
Once more, you shall face  GIOVANNI, the greatest TRAINER!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_GiovanniDefeat: Ha!  That was a truly intense fight.  You have won!
As proof, here is the EARTHBADGE!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_GiovanniPostBattle: Having lost in this fashion,   I can't face my followers.  I have betrayed their trust.
As of today, TEAM ROCKET is  finished forever!
As for myself, I shall dedicate  my life to training again.
Let us meet again someday!  Farewell!

It is evidence of your mastery as  a POKéMON TRAINER.
With it, you can challenge the  POKéMON LEAGUE.
Consider it a gift for your POKéMON  LEAGUE challenge.

I made it when I ran the GYM here,  far too long ago…
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_YouDoNotHaveSpace: You do not have space for this!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_YujiIntro: Heh!  You must be running out of steam  by now!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_YujiPostBattle: You'll need power to keep up with  our GYM LEADER.
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_AtsushiIntro: Rrrroar!  I'm working myself into a rage!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_JasonIntro: POKéMON and I, we make wonderful  music together!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_JasonPostBattle: Do you know the identity of our  GYM LEADER?
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_KiyoIntro: Karate is the ultimate form of  martial arts!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_KiyoPostBattle: If my POKéMON were as good at  karate as I…
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_WarrenIntro: The truly talented win with style.
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_WarrenPostBattle: The LEADER will scold me for  losing this way…
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_TakashiIntro: I'm the KARATE KING!  Your fate rests with me!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_TakashiPostBattle: The POKéMON LEAGUE?  You? Don't get cocky!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_ColeIntro: Your POKéMON will cower at the  crack of my whip!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_SamuelIntro: VIRIDIAN GYM was closed for a  long time.
But now, our LEADER is back!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_SamuelPostBattle: You can go on to the POKéMON  LEAGUE only by defeating our GYM  LEADER!
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_GymGuyAdvice: Even I don't know the VIRIDIAN  LEADER's identity.
But one thing's certain.  This will be the toughest of all  the GYM LEADERS.
Also, I heard that the TRAINERS  here like GROUND-type POKéMON.
ViridianCity_Gym_Text_GymGuyPostVictory: Blow me away! GIOVANNI was the  GYM LEADER of VIRIDIAN?

ViridianCity_House_EventScript_BaldingMa: Coming up with nicknames is fun,  but it's not so easy to do.
Clever names are nice, but simple  names are easier to remember.
ViridianCity_House_Text_NicknamingIsFun: Coming up with nicknames is fun,  but it's not so easy to do.
Clever names are nice, but simple  names are easier to remember.

ViridianCity_Mart_EventScript_ParcelScen: Hey!  You came from PALLET TOWN?
His order came in.  Can I get you to take it to him?
ViridianCity_Mart_EventScript_SayHiToOak: Okay, thanks! Please say hi to  PROF. OAK for me, too.
ViridianCity_Mart_EventScript_Woman: This shop does good business in  ANTIDOTES, I've heard.
ViridianCity_Mart_EventScript_Youngster: I've got to buy some POTIONS.
You never know when your POKéMON  will need quick healing.
ViridianCity_Mart_Text_YouCameFromPallet: Hey!  You came from PALLET TOWN?
ViridianCity_Mart_Text_TakeThisToProfOak: His order came in.  Can I get you to take it to him?
ViridianCity_Mart_Text_ReceivedOaksParce: [Player] received OAK'S PARCEL  from the POKéMON MART clerk.
ViridianCity_Mart_Text_SayHiToOakForMe: Okay, thanks! Please say hi to  PROF. OAK for me, too.
ViridianCity_Mart_Text_ShopDoesGoodBusin: This shop does good business in  ANTIDOTES, I've heard.
ViridianCity_Mart_Text_GotToBuySomePotio: I've got to buy some POTIONS.
You never know when your POKéMON  will need quick healing.

ViridianCity_PokemonCenter_1F_EventScrip: There's a POKéMON CENTER in every  town ahead.
They charge no money, so don't  be shy about healing POKéMON.
Please feel free to use that PC in  the corner.
The receptionist told me so.  It's so kind of her!
POKéMON CENTERS heal your tired,  hurt, or fainted POKéMON.
They make all POKéMON completely  healthy.
ViridianCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_FeelF: Please feel free to use that PC in  the corner.
The receptionist told me so.  It's so kind of her!
ViridianCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_PokeC: There's a POKéMON CENTER in every  town ahead.
They charge no money, so don't  be shy about healing POKéMON.
POKéMON CENTERS heal your tired,  hurt, or fainted POKéMON.
They make all POKéMON completely  healthy.

ViridianCity_School_EventScript_Lass: Whew! I'm trying to memorize all my  notes.
ViridianCity_School_EventScript_Woman: Be sure to read what's on the  blackboard carefully!
ViridianCity_School_EventScript_Notebook: Let's check out the notebook.
First page…
POKé BALLS are used to catch  POKéMON.
Up to six POKéMON can be carried  in your party.
People who raise and battle  with POKéMON are called TRAINERS.
Turn the page?
Second page…
A healthy POKéMON may be hard to  catch, so weaken it first.
Poison, burn, or cause another  status problem to weaken it.
Turn the page?
Third page…
POKéMON TRAINERS seek others to  engage in POKéMON battles.
To TRAINERS, the taste of victory  is sweet, indeed.
Battles are constantly waged at  POKéMON GYMS everywhere.
Turn the page?
Fourth page…
The ultimate goal for all POKéMON  TRAINERS is simple.
It is to defeat the top eight  POKéMON GYM LEADERS.
Do so to earn the right to face…
The ELITE FOUR of the POKéMON  LEAGUE!
GIRL: Hey!  Don't look at my notes!
ViridianCity_School_EventScript_Blackboa: The blackboard lists POKéMON  STATUS problems during battles.
ViridianCity_School_EventScript_ReadSlee: A POKéMON can't attack if it's  asleep.
POKéMON will stay asleep even  after battles.
Use AWAKENING to awaken one  from sleep.
ViridianCity_School_EventScript_ReadBurn: A burn reduces ATTACK power.  It also causes ongoing HP loss.
A burn remains after a battle.  Use BURN HEAL to cure a burn.
ViridianCity_School_EventScript_ReadPois: When poisoned, a POKéMON's health  steadily drops.
Poison lingers after battles.  Use an ANTIDOTE to cure poison!
ViridianCity_School_EventScript_ReadFree: A frozen POKéMON becomes  helplessly immobile.
It stays frozen even after the  battle ends.
Use ICE HEAL to thaw out the  suffering POKéMON.
ViridianCity_School_EventScript_ReadPara: Paralysis reduces SPEED and may  prevent the POKéMON from moving.
Paralysis remains after battles.  Use PARLYZ HEAL for treatment.

ViridianForest_EventScript_Youngster: I came here with some friends to  catch us some BUG POKéMON!
They're all itching to get into  some POKéMON battles!
ViridianForest_EventScript_Boy: I was throwing POKé BALLS to  catch POKéMON, and I ran out.
That's why you can never have too  many POKé BALLS.
ViridianForest_EventScript_TrainerTips1: If your POKéMON are weak and you  want to avoid battles, stay away  from grassy areas!
ViridianForest_EventScript_TrainerTips2: For poison, use ANTIDOTE!  Get it at POKéMON MARTS!
ViridianForest_EventScript_TrainerTips3: Contact PROF. OAK via a PC to  get your POKéDEX evaluated!
ViridianForest_EventScript_TrainerTips4: You can't catch a POKéMON that  belongs to someone else.
Throw POKé BALLS only at wild  POKéMON to catch them!
ViridianForest_EventScript_ExitSign: LEAVING VIRIDIAN FOREST  PEWTER CITY AHEAD
ViridianForest_EventScript_Rick: Ssh! You'll scare the bugs away.  Another time, okay?
ViridianForest_EventScript_Doug: That totally stinks! I'm going to  catch some stronger ones!
ViridianForest_EventScript_Sammy: Sometimes, you can find stuff on  the ground.
I'm looking for the stuff I  dropped. Can you help me?
ViridianForest_EventScript_Anthony: I lost some of my allowance…
ViridianForest_EventScript_Charlie: BUG POKéMON evolve quickly.  They're a lot of fun!
ViridianForest_Text_FriendsItchingToBatt: I came here with some friends to  catch us some BUG POKéMON!
They're all itching to get into  some POKéMON battles!
ViridianForest_Text_RickIntro: Hey! You have POKéMON!  Come on!  Let's battle 'em!
ViridianForest_Text_RickPostBattle: Ssh! You'll scare the bugs away.  Another time, okay?
ViridianForest_Text_DougIntro: Yo!  You can't jam out if you're a  POKéMON TRAINER!
ViridianForest_Text_DougDefeat: Huh?  I ran out of POKéMON!
ViridianForest_Text_DougPostBattle: That totally stinks! I'm going to  catch some stronger ones!
ViridianForest_Text_SammyIntro: Hey, wait up!  What's the hurry? Why the rush?
ViridianForest_Text_SammyDefeat: I give!  You're good at this!
ViridianForest_Text_SammyPostBattle: Sometimes, you can find stuff on  the ground.
I'm looking for the stuff I  dropped. Can you help me?
ViridianForest_Text_AnthonyIntro: I might be little, but I won't like  it if you go easy on me!
ViridianForest_Text_AnthonyPostBattle: I lost some of my allowance…
ViridianForest_Text_CharlieIntro: Did you know that POKéMON evolve?
ViridianForest_Text_CharliePostBattle: BUG POKéMON evolve quickly.  They're a lot of fun!
